070901.phonetic: Tla-s-go a-yv v-gi-nv-si-dv yi-gi?  tla-s-go a-qua-da-tse-li-ga yi-gi?  tla-s-go tsi-go-v-hi yi-gi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-ga-tse-li-ga?  tla-s-go a-yv da-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv yi-gi ni-hi U-gv-wi-yu-hi e-tsi-s-da-wa-de-gi tsi-gi?

070902.english: If I be not an apostle unto others, yet doubtless I am to you: for the seal of mine apostleship are ye in the Lord.
070902.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎥᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᎬᎩᏰᎸᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏭᏅᏧᏛᎢ, ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏎ ᏄᏜᏓᏏᏛᏒᎾ ᎥᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᏍᎩᏰᎸᏗ; ᏂᎯᏰᏃ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᎠᏴ ᎥᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎡᏥᏍᏓᏩᏕᎩ ᎨᏒᎢ.
070902.phonetic: I-yu-no v-gi-nv-si-dv gv-gi-ye-lv-di ni-ge-sv-na i-ge-se-s-di wu-nv-tsu-dv-i, ni-hi-s-gi-ni a-se nu-dla-si-dv-sv-na v-gi-nv-si-dv s-gi-ye-lv-di; ni-hi-ye-no a-do-le-ho-hi-s-do-di a-yv v-gi-nv-si-dv ge-sv na-s-gi U-gv-wi-yu-hi e-tsi-s-da-wa-de-gi ge-sv-i.

070903.english: Mine answer to them that do examine me is this,
070903.cherokee: ᎦᏥᏯᏬᎢᎵᏴᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᎩᎶ ᎬᎩᎪᎵᏰᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏍᏗ.
070903.phonetic: Ga-tsi-ya-wo-i-li-yv-s-da-ne-hv gi-lo gv-gi-go-li-ye-s-gi na-s-gi hi-a nu-s-di.

070904.english: Have we not power to eat and to drink?

070905.english: Have we not power to lead about a sister, a wife, as well as other apostles, and as the brethren of the Lord, and Cephas?
070905.cherokee: ᏝᏍᎪ ᏲᎩᎭ ᏦᏘᏂᏓᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏃᎯᏳᎯ ᏦᎦᏓᎵᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ, ᎾᎾᏛᏁᎲ ᎠᏂᏐᎢ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᎾᏛᏁᎲ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ, ᎠᎴ ᏏᏆᏏ?
070905.phonetic: Tla-s-go yo-gi-ha tso-ti-ni-da-s-di-yi u-no-hi-yu-hi tso-ga-da-li-i, na-s-gi-ya, na-na-dv-ne-hv a-ni-so-i ge-tsi-nv-si-dv, a-le na-na-dv-ne-hv U-gv-wi-yu-hi a-na-li-nv-tli, a-le Si-qua-si?

070906.english: Or I only and Barnabas, have not we power to forbear working?
070906.cherokee: ᏥᎪᎨ ᎠᏴ ᎠᎴ ᏆᏂᏆ ᎣᎩᏅᏒ, ᎥᏝ ᏲᎩᏂᎭ ᎣᎩᏂᏲᎯᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎣᏍᏓᏛᏁᎲᎢ?
070906.phonetic: Tsi-go-ge a-yv a-le Qua-ni-qua o-gi-nv-sv, v-tla yo-gi-ni-ha o-gi-ni-yo-hi-s-do-di-yi go-hu-s-di o-s-da-dv-ne-hv-i?

070907.english: Who goeth a warfare any time at his own charges? who planteth a vineyard, and eateth not of the fruit thereof? or who feedeth a flock, and eateth not of the milk of the flock?
070907.cherokee: ᎦᎪ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᏓᎿᎭᏩ ᎡᎪᎢ ᎤᏩᏒᏉ ᎤᎫᏴᎯᏓᏍᏗ ᎠᎫᏴᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ?  ᎦᎪ ᏓᏫᏍᎪ ᏖᎸᎳᏗ ᏂᏗᎦᏰᏍᎬᎾᏃ ᎨᏐ ᎤᎾᏓᏛᏅᎯ?  ᎠᎴ ᎦᎪ ᏓᎦᏘᏲ ᎠᏫ, ᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏍᎬᎾᏃ ᎨᏐ ᎤᏅᏗ ᎠᏫ ᎤᏂᏁᏅᎯ?
070907.phonetic: Ga-go i-lv-hi-yu da-hna-wa e-go-i u-wa-sv-quo u-gu-yv-hi-da-s-di a-gu-yv-di ge-sv-i?  ga-go da-wi-s-go te-lv-la-di ni-di-ga-ye-s-gv-na-no ge-so u-na-da-dv-nv-hi?  a-le ga-go da-ga-ti-yo a-wi, na-li-s-da-yv-di-s-gv-na-no ge-so u-nv-di a-wi u-ni-ne-nv-hi?

070908.english: Say I these things as a man? or saith not the law the same also?
070908.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏂᏥᏪᎠ, ᏥᎪ ᏴᏫᏉ ᎤᏓᏅᏖᏛ ᏂᏥᏪᎠ?  ᎾᏍᏉᎨ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎦᏪᎭ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ?
070908.phonetic: Hi-a na-s-gi tsi-ni-tsi-we-a, tsi-go yv-wi-quo u-da-nv-te-dv ni-tsi-we-a?  na-s-quo-ge na-s-gi-ya ni-ga-we-ha di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di?

070909.english: For it is written in the law of Moses, Thou shalt not muzzle the mouth of the ox that treadeth out the corn. Doth God take care for oxen?
070909.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎪᏪᎳ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ ᎼᏏ ᎤᏬᏪᎳᏅᎯ; ᎥᏝ ᎯᏴᏑᎶᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏩᎦ ᎠᎦᏔᏙᎥᏗᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᎴᏍᏗ.  ᏩᎦᏉᏍᎪ ᏓᏓᏅᏖᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ?
070909.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no ni-gv-nv go-we-la di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-yi Mo-si u-wo-we-la-nv-hi; v-tla hi-yv-su-lo-di yi-ge-se-s-di wa-ga a-ga-ta-do-v-di-s-gi u-tsa-le-s-di.  Wa-ga-quo-s-go da-da-nv-te-ha U-ne-la-nv-hi?

070910.english: Or saith he it altogether for our sakes? For our sakes, no doubt, this is written: that he that ploweth should plow in hope; and that he that thresheth in hope should be partaker of his hope.
070910.cherokee: ᏥᎪᎨ ᎠᏴ Ꮀ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎭ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏂᎦᏪᎭ?  ᎥᏝ ᏳᏜᏓᏏᏛᎭ ᎠᏴ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏂᎬᏅ ᏥᎪᏪᎳ; ᎩᎶᏰᏃ ᎦᏓᎷᎩᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏚᎩ ᏳᏩᎭ ᎦᏓᎷᎩᏍᎬᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎤᏩᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᏙᎥᏗᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏳᏪᎳᏗᏍᏗᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎤᏩᏒᎢ
070910.phonetic: Tsi-go-ge a-yv ho u-gv-wi-yu-ha nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha na-s-gi tsi-ni-ga-we-ha?  v-tla yu-dla-si-dv-ha a-yv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv na-s-gi tsi-ni-gv-nv tsi-go-we-la; gi-lo-ye-no ga-da-lu-gi-s-gi na-s-gi u-du-gi yu-wa-ha ga-da-lu-gi-s-gv-i; a-le gi-lo u-du-gi u-wa-hi a-ga-ta-do-v-di-s-gi na-s-gi yu-we-la-di-s-di-ha na-s-gi u-du-gi u-wa-sv-i

070911.english: If we have sown unto you spiritual things, is it a great thing if we shall reap your carnal things?
070911.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᏗᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᏱᏨᏫᏎᎸ, ᏥᏌ ᎡᏉᎯᏳᏉ ᎢᎩ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᏱᏨᏍᎫᏕᏎᎭ?
070911.phonetic: I-yu-no di-da-nv-do u-gv-wa-li yi-tsv-wi-se-lv, tsi-sa e-quo-hi-yu-quo i-gi, i-yu-no u-que-da-li u-gv-wa-li yi-tsv-s-gu-de-se-ha?

070912.english: If others be partakers of this power over you, are not we rather? Nevertheless we have not used this power; but suffer all things, lest we should hinder the gospel of Christ.
070912.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎢᎨᏨᏁᏗᏱ ᏳᏂᎭ; ᏝᏍᎪ ᎠᏴ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ?  ᎥᏝᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎢᎦᏲᎦᏛᏁᏗ ᎣᎩᎲ ᏱᏃᎦᏛᏁᎸ; ᎤᏁᎳᎩᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎣᎨᎵᏒ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎣᎩᏂᎬᏎᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᎦᎵᏫᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎠᎢᏒᎢ.
070912.phonetic: I-yu-no nv-wa-na-da-le na-s-gi hi-a i-ge-tsv-ne-di-yi yu-ni-ha; tla-s-go a-yv u-tli i-ga-i?  v-tla-s-gi-ni-no-nv na-s-gi hi-a i-ga-yo-ga-dv-ne-di o-gi-hv yi-no-ga-dv-ne-lv; u-ne-la-gi-quo-s-gi-ni o-ge-li-sv ni-ga-v tsu-da-le-nv-dv o-gi-ni-gv-se-hv-i, na-s-gi o-ga-li-wi-s-do-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li a-i-sv-i.

070913.english: Do ye not know that they which minister about holy things live of the things of the temple? and they which wait at the alter are partakers with the alter?
070913.cherokee: ᏝᏍᎪ ᏱᏥᎦᏔᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎠᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏍᎬ ᏗᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏥᎸ ᎨᎳᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᏂᎦᏘᏯᏕᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏗᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎠᏥᎸ ᎨᎳᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ?
070913.phonetic: Tla-s-go yi-tsi-ga-ta-ha, na-s-gi ga-lv-quo-di-yu di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi a-na-li-s-da-yv-di-s-gv di-ga-lv-quo-di ge-sv-i; a-le na-s-gi a-tsi-lv ge-la-s-di-yi a-ni-ga-ti-ya-de-gi na-s-gi u-ne-la-di-s-di-s-gv a-tsi-lv ge-la-s-di-yi a-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi?

070914.english: Even so hath the Lord ordained that they which preach the gospel should live of the gospel.
070914.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯᏉ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏚᏭᎪᏔᏅ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎠᎾᎵᏥᏙᎲᏍᎩ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᎾᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗᏱ.
070914.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya-quo U-gv-wi-yu-hi du-wu-go-ta-nv, na-s-gi o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv a-na-li-tsi-do-hv-s-gi tsi-gi, na-s-gi o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv u-na-li-s-de-lv-do-di-yi.

070915.english: But I have used none of these things: neither have I written these things, that it should be so done unto me: for it were better for me to die, than that any man should make my glorying void.
070915.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᏋᏔᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ; ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏱᎪᏪᎸᎦ, ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏴᏆᏛᏁᏗᏱ; ᎤᏟᏰᏃ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏯᏆᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏯᎩᏲᎱᏒᏉ, ᎠᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎠᏎᏉ ᏱᏄᏩᏁᎸ ᎠᏆᏢᏆᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
070915.phonetic: A-se-no v-tla go-hu-s-di a-quv-ta-nv-hi yi-gi na-s-gi hi-a; v-tla a-le na-s-gi hi-a yi-go-we-lv-ga, a-yv na-s-gi i-yv-qua-dv-ne-di-yi; u-tli-ye-no o-si-yu i-ya-qua-li-s-da-ne-di ya-gi-yo-hu-sv-quo, a-no gi-lo a-se-quo yi-nu-wa-ne-lv a-qua-tlv-qua-s-do-di ge-sv-i.

070916.english: For though I preach the gospel, I have nothing to glory of: for necessity is laid upon me; yea, woe is unto me, if I preach not the gospel!
070916.cherokee: ᎾᏍᏉᏰᏃ ᏱᎦᎵᏥᏙᎲᏍᎦ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ, ᎥᏝ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏯᎩᎭ ᎠᏆᏢᏈᏍᏙᏗ.  ᎠᏎᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏯᏆᏛᏁᏗ ᏅᏋᏁᎸ; ᎥᎥ, ᎤᏲ ᎢᏯᏆᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏂᎦᎵᏥᏙᎲᏍᎬᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
070916.phonetic: Na-s-quo-ye-no yi-ga-li-tsi-do-hv-s-ga o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv, v-tla go-hu-s-di ya-gi-ha a-qua-tlv-qui-s-do-di.  A-se-ye-no na-s-gi i-ya-qua-dv-ne-di nv-quv-ne-lv; v-v, u-yo i-ya-qua-li-s-da-ne-di, i-yu-no o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv ni-ga-li-tsi-do-hv-s-gv-na i-ge-se-s-di.

070917.english: For if I do this thing willingly, I have a reward: but if against my will, a dispensation of the gospel is committed unto me.
070917.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎠᎩᏰᎸᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏱᏂᎦᏛᏁᎭ ᎥᏆᎫᏴᎡᎭ; ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎠᎩᏰᎸᏅᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎥᏆᏒᎦᎶᏔᏅ.
070917.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no o-si-yu a-gi-ye-lv-nv-hi na-s-gi hi-a yi-ni-ga-dv-ne-ha v-qua-gu-yv-e-ha; i-yu-s-gi-ni o-si-yu a-gi-ye-lv-nv-hi ni-ge-sv-na i-ge-se-s-di hna-quo di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di v-qua-sv-ga-lo-ta-nv.

070918.english: What is my reward then? Verily that, when I preach the gospel, I may make the gospel of Christ without charge, that I abuse not my power in the gospel.
070918.cherokee: ᎦᏙᏃ ᎥᏆᎫᏴᎡᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ?  ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎦᎵᏥᏙᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᏯᏋᏁᏗᏱ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏯᏆᏛᏁᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎠᏆᏒᎦᎸ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ.
070918.phonetic: Ga-do-no v-qua-gu-yv-e-di ge-se-s-di?  hi-a na-s-gi, na-s-gi o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv ga-li-tsi-do-hv-s-ge-s-di tsu-gv-wa-lo-di ni-ge-sv-na i-ya-quv-ne-di-yi o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li-ga; na-s-gi u-yo i-ya-qua-dv-ne-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na nu-s-dv a-qua-sv-ga-lv o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv ge-sv-i.

070919.english: For though I be free from all men, yet have I made myself servant unto all, that I might gain the more.
070919.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎠᎩᎾᏝᎢ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎬᎩᎾᏝᎢ ᎾᏆᏓᏛᏁᎸ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏟ ᎢᏯᏂᎢ ᎬᎩᏁᏉᏤᏗᏱ.
070919.phonetic: Gi-lo-s-gi-ni-no-nv a-gi-na-tla-i ni-ge-sv-na, a-se-no na-ni-v gv-gi-na-tla-i na-qua-da-dv-ne-lv, na-s-gi u-tli i-ya-ni-i gv-gi-ne-quo-tse-di-yi.

070920.english: And unto the Jews I became as a Jew, that I might gain the Jews; to them that are under the law, as under the law, that I might gain them that are under the law;
070920.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎲ ᏥᏧᏏ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏆᎵᏍᏔᏅᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎬᎩᏁᏉᏤᏗᏱ; ᎾᏃ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᎾᏓᏄᏴᏗ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎲ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ ᏣᏆᏓᏄᏴᏙ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᎩᏁᏉᏤᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᎾᏓᏄᏴᏗ.
070920.phonetic: A-ni-tsu-si a-ni-ga-ta-hv Tsi-tsu-si na-s-gi-ya na-qua-li-s-ta-nv-gi na-s-gi A-ni-tsu-si gv-gi-ne-quo-tse-di-yi; na-no di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-yi u-na-da-nu-yv-di a-ni-ga-ta-hv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-yi tsa-qua-da-nu-yv-do na-s-gi-ya-i, na-s-gi gv-gi-ne-quo-tse-di-yi na-s-gi na di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-yi u-na-da-nu-yv-di.

070921.english: To them that are without law, as without law, (being not without law to God, but under the law to Christ,) that I might gain them that are without law.
070921.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎲ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ ᏄᎾᏓᏄᏴᏛᎾ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ ᎾᏆᏓᏄᏴᏛᎾ ᏥᎨᏐ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᎩᏁᏉᏤᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ ᏄᎾᏓᏄᏴᏛᎾ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ ᎾᏆᏓᏄᏴᏛᎾ ᏱᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᎲᎢ, ᎠᏆᏓᏄᏴᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᎦᏔᎲᎢ.
070921.phonetic: Na-s-gi a-ni-ga-ta-hv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-yi nu-na-da-nu-yv-dv-na di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-yi na-qua-da-nu-yv-dv-na tsi-ge-so na-s-gi-ya-i, na-s-gi gv-gi-ne-quo-tse-di-yi na-s-gi na di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-yi nu-na-da-nu-yv-dv-na, a-se-no v-tla di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-yi na-qua-da-nu-yv-dv-na yi-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ga-ta-hv-i, a-qua-da-nu-yv-di-s-gi-ni di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-yi Ga-lo-ne-dv a-ga-ta-hv-i.

070922.english: To the weak became I as weak, that I might gain the weak: I am made all things to all men, that I might by all means save some.
070922.cherokee: ᏗᏂᏩᎾᎦᎳ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎲ, ᏥᏩᎾᎦᎳ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏆᎵᏍᏔᏅᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏂᏩᎾᎦᎳ ᎬᎩᏁᏉᏤᏗᏱ; ᏂᎦᎥᏉ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎾᏆᎵᏍᏔᏅ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏄᎾᏓᎴᏒ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏓᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᏎ ᎢᎦᏛ ᎦᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ.
070922.phonetic: Di-ni-wa-na-ga-la a-ni-ga-ta-hv, tsi-wa-na-ga-la na-s-gi-ya na-qua-li-s-ta-nv-gi, na-s-gi di-ni-wa-na-ga-la gv-gi-ne-quo-tse-di-yi; ni-ga-v-quo nu-da-le-sv na-qua-li-s-ta-nv na-ni-v nu-na-da-le-sv a-ni-ga-ta-hv-i, na-s-gi nv-da-yu-li-s-do-di-yi a-se i-ga-dv ga-tsi-s-de-lv-di-yi.

070923.english: And this I do for the gospel's sake, that I might be partaker thereof with you.
070923.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏛᏁᎰ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎪᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏇᎳᏗᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
070923.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi hi-a ni-ga-dv-ne-ho o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-go-i, na-s-gi na-hna a-que-la-di-s-gi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

070924.english: Know ye not that they which run in a race run all, but one receiveth the prize? So run, that ye may obtain.
070924.cherokee: ᏝᏍᎪ ᏱᏥᎦᏔ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᎾᏙᎩᏯᏍᎩ, ᏂᎦᏛ ᎠᎾᏙᎩᏯᏍᎬᎢ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏏᏴᏫᏉ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎠᏌᏍᏛᎢ?  ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᏙᎩᏯᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏣᏤᎵ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
070924.phonetic: Tla-s-go yi-tsi-ga-ta na-s-gi na a-na-do-gi-ya-s-gi, ni-ga-dv a-na-do-gi-ya-s-gv-i, a-se-no a-si-yv-wi-quo u-tse-li ni-ga-li-s-di-s-gv a-sa-s-dv-i?  Na-s-gi nu-s-de-s-di i-tsa-do-gi-ya-s-ge-s-di na-s-gi i-tsa-tse-li i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

070925.english: And every man that striveth for the mastery is temperate in all things. Now they do it to obtain a corruptible crown; but we an incorruptible.
070925.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎤᎾᏓᏎᎪᎩᏍᏗᏱ ᏣᎾᏟᏂᎬᏁᎰ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎤᎾᎵᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᏳ ᎨᏐᎢ.  ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏲᎩᏉ ᎠᎵᏍᏚᎶ ᎨᏥᏅᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᎾᏚᎵᏍᎪᎢ, ᎠᏴᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏲᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
070925.phonetic: A-le na-ni-v u-na-da-se-go-gi-s-di-yi tsa-na-tli-ni-gv-ne-ho ni-ga-v u-na-li-s-qua-ni-go-di-yu ge-so-i.  A-le na-s-gi a-yo-gi-quo a-li-s-du-lo ge-tsi-nv-ne-di-yi u-na-du-li-s-go-i, a-yv-s-gi-ni a-yo-gi ni-ge-sv-na.

070926.english: I therefore so run, not as uncertainly; so fight I, not as one that beateth the air:
070926.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏴ ᎦᏙᎩᏯᏍᎬ ᎥᏝ ᎬᏁᎳᎩᏉ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏱᎦᏙᎩᏯᏍᎦ; ᎦᎵᎲ ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏃᎴᏉ ᏥᎦᎵᎥᏂᎰ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏱᎦᎵᎭ.
070926.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di a-yv ga-do-gi-ya-s-gv v-tla gv-ne-la-gi-quo na-s-gi-ya yi-ga-do-gi-ya-s-ga; ga-li-hv v-tla gi-lo u-no-le-quo tsi-ga-li-v-ni-ho na-s-gi-ya yi-ga-li-ha.

070927.english: But I keep under my body, and bring it into subjection: lest that by any means, when I have preached to others, I myself should be a castaway.
070927.cherokee: ᏥᏰᎸᏍᎩᏂ ᎡᎳᏗ ᏂᏥᏴᏫᏕᎪᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᎾᏝᎢ ᏂᏥᏴᏁᎰᎢ; ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎪ ᎾᏆᏚᎵᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏥᏯᎵᏥᏙᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏭᏅᎫᏛᎢ, ᎠᏴ ᎠᏋᏒ ᎥᎩᏐᏅᎢᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
070927.phonetic: Tsi-ye-lv-s-gi-ni e-la-di ni-tsi-yv-wi-de-go-i, a-le tsi-na-tla-i ni-tsi-yv-ne-ho-i; nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-go na-qua-du-li-s-gv-na ge-sv na-s-gi ga-tsi-ya-li-tsi-do-ne-lv-hi ge-sv wu-nv-gu-dv-i, a-yv a-quv-sv v-gi-so-nv-i-s-ta-nv-hi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

071001.english: Moreover, brethren, I would not that ye should be ignorant, how that all our fathers were under the cloud, and all passed through the sea;
071001.cherokee: ᎠᎴ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎥᏝ ᎾᏂᎦᏔᎲᎾᏉ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏱᏨᏰᎵᏎᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏂᎥᏉ ᏗᎩᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎤᎶᎩᎸ ᎭᏫᏂᏗᏢ ᎤᏁᏙᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎠᎺᏉᎯ ᎤᏂᎶᏒᎢ,
071001.phonetic: A-le, i-da-li-nv-tli, v-tla na-ni-ga-ta-hv-na-quo ge-se-s-di yi-tsv-ye-li-se-ha, na-s-gi na-ni-v-quo di-gi-ga-yv-li-ge u-lo-gi-lv ha-wi-ni-di-tlv u-ne-do-lv-i, a-le ni-ga-dv a-me-quo-hi u-ni-lo-sv-i,

071002.english: And were all baptized unto Moses in the cloud and in the sea;
071002.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏕᎨᎦᏬᏍᎨ ᎤᏣᎩᎸ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎺᏉᎯ ᎼᏏ ᎬᏩᎵᎪᏁᎮᎢ.
071002.phonetic: A-le ni-ga-dv de-ge-ga-wo-s-ge u-tsa-gi-lv a-le a-me-quo-hi Mo-si gv-wa-li-go-ne-he-i.

071003.english: And did all eat the same spiritual meat;
071003.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᏠᏱᏉ ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏍᎬᎢ,
071003.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi ni-ga-dv u-tlo-yi-quo a-li-s-da-yv-di a-da-nv-do u-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi a-na-li-s-da-yv-di-s-gv-i,

071004.english: And did all drink the same spiritual drink: for they drank of that spiritual Rock that followed them: and that Rock was Christ.
071004.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᏠᏱᏉ ᎠᏗᏔᏍᏗ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᎾᏗᏔᏍᎬᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᏅᏯ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᏍᏚᎢᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏂᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎮᎢ, ᎾᎿᎭᎤᏄᎪᏨᎯ ᎠᎾᏗᏔᏍᎨᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏅᏯ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎨᏒᎩ.
071004.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi ni-ga-dv u-tlo-yi-quo a-di-ta-s-di a-da-nv-do u-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi a-na-di-ta-s-gv-i; na-s-gi-ye-no Nv-ya a-da-nv-do u-s-du-i-dv, na-s-gi tsu-ni-s-da-wa-di-do-he-i, na-hna u-nu-go-tsv-hi a-na-di-ta-s-ge-i; a-le na-s-gi na Nv-ya Ga-lo-ne-dv ge-sv-gi.

071005.english: But with many of them God was not well pleased: for they were overthrown in the wilderness.
071005.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏟ ᎢᏯᏂᎢ ᎥᏝ ᎣᏏᏳ ᏱᏚᏰᎸᏎ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎢᎾᎨᏉᏰᏃ ᎨᏥᏛᏔᏁᎢ.
071005.phonetic: A-se-no na-s-gi u-tli i-ya-ni-i v-tla o-si-yu yi-du-ye-lv-se U-ne-la-nv-hi, i-na-ge-quo-ye-no ge-tsi-dv-ta-ne-i.

071006.english: Now these things were our examples, to the intent we should not lust after evil things, as they also lusted.
071006.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏴ ᏗᎦᏟᎶᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏲ ᎢᎩᎬᎥᏍᎩ ᎢᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏧᏂᎬᎥᏍᎨᎢ.
071006.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no hi-a tsu-da-le-nv-dv ge-sv a-yv di-ga-tli-lo-s-do-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi u-yo i-gi-gv-v-s-gi i-ga-li-s-do-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na na-s-gi-ya na-s-gi na tsu-ni-gv-v-s-ge-i.

071007.english: Neither be ye idolaters, as were some of them; as it is written, The people sat down to eat and drink, and rose up to play.
071007.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏗᏰᎸᎯ ᏗᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᎦᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏥᏄᎾᏍᏕᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎬᏅ ᏥᎪᏪᎳ, ᏴᏫ ᎤᎾᏅᏅᎩ ᏛᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏂᏒᎩ ᎠᎴ ᏛᎾᏗᏔᎯᏒᎩ, ᏚᎾᎴᏅᎩ ᎤᎾᏁᏦᏅᎩ.
071007.phonetic: Tle-s-di a-le u-ne-la-nv-hi di-ye-lv-hi di-tsa-da-do-li-s-da-ne-hi yi-ge-se-s-di, na-s-gi-ya i-ga-dv na-s-gi na tsi-nu-na-s-de-i; na-s-gi-ya hi-a tsi-ni-gv-nv tsi-go-we-la, Yv-wi u-na-nv-nv-gi dv-na-li-s-da-yv-ni-sv-gi a-le dv-na-di-ta-hi-sv-gi, du-na-le-nv-gi u-na-ne-tso-nv-gi.

071008.english: Neither let us commit fornication, as some of them committed, and fell in one day three and twenty thousand.
071008.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᏱᏗᏓᏂᏏᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᎦᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᎾᏛᏁᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏏᎦᏉ ᏦᎢᏦᏁ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᏥᏚᏂᏲᎱᏎᎢ.
071008.phonetic: Tle-s-di a-le u-de-li-dv yi-di-da-ni-si-hv-s-ge-s-di na-s-gi-ya i-ga-dv na-s-gi nu-na-dv-ne-lv-i, a-le si-ga-quo tso-i-tso-ne i-ya-ga-yv-li tsi-du-ni-yo-hu-se-i.

071009.english: Neither let us tempt Christ, as some of them also tempted, and were destroyed of serpents.
071009.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏰᏗᎪᎵᏰᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎢᎦᏛ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏥᎬᏩᎪᎵᏰᎡᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎾᏛ ᏥᎬᏩᏂᏛᏔᏁᎢ.
071009.phonetic: Tle-s-di a-le Ga-lo-ne-dv ye-di-go-li-ye-s-ge-s-di, na-s-gi-ya na-s-gi na i-ga-dv na-s-quo tsi-gv-wa-go-li-ye-e-i, a-le na-s-gi i-na-dv tsi-gv-wa-ni-dv-ta-ne-i.

071010.english: Neither murmur ye, as some of them also murmured, and were destroyed of the destroyer.
071010.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏱᏥᎪᏁᎶᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎢᎦᏛ ᏥᏄᎾᏛᏁᎴ ᏧᏂᎪᏁᎶᏍᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᎬᏩᏂᏛᏔᏁ ᎠᎾᏓᏛᏗᏍᎩ.
071010.phonetic: Tle-s-di a-le yi-tsi-go-ne-lo-s-ge-s-di, na-s-gi-ya na-s-gi na i-ga-dv tsi-nu-na-dv-ne-le tsu-ni-go-ne-lo-s-ge-i, a-le tsi-gv-wa-ni-dv-ta-ne a-na-da-dv-di-s-gi.

071011.english: Now all these things happened unto them for ensamples: and they are written for our admonition, upon whom the ends of the world are come.
071011.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏥᏄᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᎴ ᏗᏟᎶᏍᏙᏗ ᎠᏰᎸᏎᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᏕᎪᏪᎳ ᎠᏴ ᎢᎦᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᎸᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏥᎩᎷᏤᎸ.
071011.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no hi-a ni-ga-dv tsu-da-le-nv-dv tsi-nu-na-li-s-da-ne-le di-tli-lo-s-do-di a-ye-lv-se-i; a-le de-go-we-la a-yv i-ga-nv-da-di-s-di-s-gi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi, a-yv na-s-gi u-li-s-qua-lv-di ge-sv e-lo-hi tsi-gi-lu-tse-lv.

071012.english: Wherefore let him that thinketh he standeth take heed lest he fall.
071012.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎩᎶ ᏥᏙᎦ ᎡᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎨᏯᏔᎮᏍᏗ ᏱᎦᏅᎩᏰᏃ.
071012.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di gi-lo tsi-do-ga e-li-s-ge-s-di ge-ya-ta-he-s-di yi-ga-nv-gi-ye-no.

071013.english: There hath no temptation taken you but such as is common to man: but God is faithful, who will not suffer you to be tempted above that ye are able; but will with the temptation also make a way to escape, that ye may be able to bear it.
071013.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏍᏗ ᎠᏓᎪᎵᏰᏍᎩ ᎢᏣᏢᏔᎲᎯ ᏱᎩ ᎾᏂᎥᏉ ᏴᏫ ᎢᎬᏩᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎤᏩᏒ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏄᏓᎵᏓᏍᏛᎾ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᏴᎨᏤᎵᏏ ᎠᏓᎪᎵᏰᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᎷᏤᏗᏱ ᏕᏣᎵᏂᎬᎬ ᎤᎶᏒᏍᏙᏗᏱ; ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏓᎪᎵᏰᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᎷᏤᎲ ᏔᎵ ᎾᏛᏕᏍᏗ ᎾᎿᎭᎦᏰᏣᏗᏫᏎᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏰᎵ ᎨᏣᏓᎵᏁᎯᏗᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
071013.phonetic: V-tla go-hu-s-di u-s-di a-da-go-li-ye-s-gi i-tsa-tlv-ta-hv-hi yi-gi na-ni-v-quo yv-wi i-gv-wa-li-s-da-ne-di u-wa-sv; a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi nu-da-li-da-s-dv-na, na-s-gi v-tla u-ne-la-gi yv-ge-tse-li-si a-da-go-li-ye-s-gi i-tsi-lu-tse-di-yi de-tsa-li-ni-gv-gv u-lo-sv-s-do-di-yi; na-s-gi-s-gi-ni a-da-go-li-ye-s-gi i-tsi-lu-tse-hv ta-li na-dv-de-s-di na-hna ga-ye-tsa-di-wi-se-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi ye-li ge-tsa-da-li-ne-hi-di-s-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

071014.english: Wherefore, my dearly beloved, flee from idolatry.
071014.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᏂᎯ ᎢᏨᎨᏳᎢ, ᎢᏣᎵᏘ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏏ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏗᏰᎸᎯ ᏗᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
071014.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di, ni-hi i-tsv-ge-yu-i, i-tsa-li-ti i-tsa-da-nv-si U-ne-la-nv-hi di-ye-lv-hi di-da-do-li-s-da-ne-di ge-sv-i.

071015.english: I speak as to wise men; judge ye what I say.
071015.cherokee: ᏥᏁᎦ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎾᎢ ᏥᎦᏥᏁᏤᎰ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ; ᎢᏥᎪᎵᏯ ᏂᏥᏪᏍᎬᎢ.
071015.phonetic: Tsi-ne-ga a-ni-ga-ta-na-i tsi-ga-tsi-ne-tse-ho na-s-gi-ya-i; i-tsi-go-li-ya ni-tsi-we-s-gv-i.

071016.english: The cup of blessing which we bless, is it not the communion of the blood of Christ? The bread which we break, is it not the communion of the body of Christ?
071016.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎦᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᎤᎵᏍᏈᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏗᎸᏉᏗᏍᎪᎢ, ᏝᏍᎪ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏓᎵᎪᎲᏍᎬ ᏱᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᎩᎬ ᎢᏓᏗᏔᏍᎬᎢ?  ᎦᏚ ᏥᏗᎬᎭᎷᏯᏍᎪᎢ, ᏝᏍᎪ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏓᎵᎪᎲᏍᎬ ᏱᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᏰᎸ ᎢᏓᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏍᎬᎢ?
071016.phonetic: Na-s-gi na ga-lv-quo-do-di u-li-s-qui-di, na-s-gi tsi-di-lv-quo-di-s-go-i, tla-s-go na-s-gi i-da-li-go-hv-s-gv yi-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv u-gi-gv i-da-di-ta-s-gv-i?  Ga-du tsi-di-gv-ha-lu-ya-s-go-i, tla-s-go na-s-gi i-da-li-go-hv-s-gv yi-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv a-ye-lv i-da-li-s-da-yv-di-s-gv-i?

071017.english: For we being many are one bread, and one body: for we are all partakers of that one bread.
071017.cherokee: ᎠᏴᏰᏃ ᎢᎩᏣᏘ ᏥᎩ, ᏌᏉᏉ ᎦᏚ, ᎠᎴ ᏌᏉᏉ ᎠᏰᎸᎢ; ᏂᏗᎥᏰᏃ ᎢᎦᏖᏆᎶᏐ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏌᏉ ᎦᏚ ᎢᏓᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏍᎬᎢ.
071017.phonetic: A-yv-ye-no i-gi-tsa-ti tsi-gi, sa-quo-quo ga-du, a-le sa-quo-quo a-ye-lv-i; ni-di-v-ye-no i-ga-te-qua-lo-so na-s-gi sa-quo ga-du i-da-li-s-da-yv-di-s-gv-i.

071018.english: Behold Israel after the flesh: are not they which eat of the sacrifices partakers of the alter?
071018.cherokee: ᏗᏣᎧᏅᎦ ᎢᏏᎵ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏇᏓᎵᏉ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᏝᏍᎪ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏗᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ ᏣᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏍᎪ ᎤᏁᎳᏗᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᏱᎨᏐ ᎠᏥᎸ ᎨᎳᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ?
071018.phonetic: Di-tsa-ka-nv-ga I-si-li na-s-gi u-que-da-li-quo ge-sv-i; tla-s-go na-s-gi na di-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi tsa-na-li-s-da-yv-di-s-go u-ne-la-di-s-di-s-gi yi-ge-so a-tsi-lv ge-la-s-di-yi a-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi?

071019.english: What say I then? that the idol is any thing, or that which is offered in sacrifice to idols is any thing?
071019.cherokee: ᎦᏙᏃ ᎦᏗᎭ?  ᏥᎪ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᏰᎸᎯ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎦᏗᎭ?  ᏥᎪᎨ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᏥᎸ ᎨᎳᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᏰᎸᎯ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ, ᎦᏗᎭ?
071019.phonetic: Ga-do-no ga-di-ha?  tsi-go u-ne-la-nv-hi a-ye-lv-hi go-hu-s-di ga-di-ha?  tsi-go-ge na-s-gi na a-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi a-tsi-lv ge-la-s-da-ne-di u-ne-la-nv-hi a-ye-lv-hi go-hu-s-di, ga-di-ha?

071020.english: But I say, that the things which the Gentiles sacrifice, they sacrifice to devils, and not to God: and I would not that ye should have fellowship with devils.
071020.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᏥᏪᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏥᎸ ᎨᎳᏍᏙᏗ ᏣᎾᎵᏍᎪᎸᏗᏍᎪᎢ, ᎠᏂᏍᎩᎾ ᏓᎾᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏁᎰᎢ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ; ᎥᏝᏃ ᏯᏆᏚᎵᎭ ᎠᏂᏍᎩᎾ ᎤᎾᏤᎵ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏤᎳᏗᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
071020.phonetic: Hi-a-s-gi-ni ni-tsi-we-ha, na-s-gi na tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi a-tsi-lv ge-la-s-do-di tsa-na-li-s-go-lv-di-s-go-i, a-ni-s-gi-na da-na-li-s-go-lv-ta-ne-ho-i, v-tla-no U-ne-la-nv-hi; v-tla-no ya-qua-du-li-ha a-ni-s-gi-na u-na-tse-li ge-sv i-tse-la-di-s-do-di-yi.

071021.english: Ye cannot drink the cup of the Lord, and the cup of devils: ye cannot be partakers of the Lord's table, and of the table of devils.
071021.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎨᏣᏗᏔᏍᏗ ᏱᎩ ᎠᏟᏍᏛ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏂᏍᎩᎾ ᎤᎾᏤᎵ ᎠᏟᏍᏛᎢ.  ᎥᏝ ᎨᏣᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗ ᏱᎩ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏪᏍᎩᎸ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏂᏍᎩᎾ ᎤᏂᏍᎩᎸᎢ.
071021.phonetic: V-tla Ge-tsa-di-ta-s-di yi-gi a-tli-s-dv U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-tse-li-ga, a-le na-s-quo a-ni-s-gi-na u-na-tse-li a-tli-s-dv-i.  V-tla ge-tsa-li-s-da-yv-di yi-gi U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-we-s-gi-lv, a-le na-s-quo a-ni-s-gi-na u-ni-s-gi-lv-i.

071022.english: Do we provoke the Lord to jealousy? are we stronger than he?
071022.cherokee: ᎡᏗᎿᎭᎸᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗᏍᎪ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ?  ᎤᏟᏍᎪ ᏂᏕᎦᎵᏂᎬᎦ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ?
071022.phonetic: E-di-hna-lv-s-di-s-ge-s-di-s-go U-gv-wi-yu-hi?  u-tli-s-go ni-de-ga-li-ni-gv-ga e-s-ga-quo na-s-gi?

071023.english: All things are lawful for me, but all things are not expedient: all things are lawful for me, but all things edify not.
071023.cherokee: ᏄᏓᎴᏒᏉ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᎥᏇᎵᏎᎸᎯ ᎠᏆᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏯᏓᏛᏁᎯ ᏱᎩ; ᏄᏓᎴᏒᏉ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᎥᏇᎵᏎᎸᎯ ᎠᏆᎵᏍᏓᏴᏙᏗᏱ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎬᏩᏓᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᏱᎩ.
071023.phonetic: Nu-da-le-sv-quo go-hu-s-di u-ne-la-gi v-que-li-se-lv-hi a-qua-li-s-da-yv-di-yi, a-se-no v-tla nu-da-le-sv go-hu-s-di o-si-yu i-ya-da-dv-ne-hi yi-gi; nu-da-le-sv-quo go-hu-s-di u-ne-la-gi v-que-li-se-lv-hi a-qua-li-s-da-yv-do-di-yi, a-se-no v-tla nu-da-le-sv go-hu-s-di gv-wa-da-s-de-lv-di yi-gi.

071024.english: Let no man seek his own, but every man another's wealth.
071024.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏩᏒᏉ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏳᏲᎮᏍᏗ, ᏅᏩᏓᎴᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎤᏲᎮᏍᏗ.
071024.phonetic: Tle-s-di gi-lo u-wa-sv-quo u-tse-li yu-yo-he-s-di, nv-wa-da-le-s-gi-ni u-tse-li u-yo-he-s-di.

071025.english: Whatsoever is sold in the shambles, that eat, asking no question for conscience sake:
071025.cherokee: ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᏃᏗᏍᎬ ᎦᏃᏙᏗᏱ, ᎢᏥᎩᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏝᏍᏗ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏱᏣᏛᏛᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᏓᏅᏙᎩ ᎨᏒ ᏱᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
071025.phonetic: Ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di a-ni-no-di-s-gv ga-no-do-di-yi, i-tsi-gi-s-ge-s-di, a-le tla-s-di go-hu-s-di yi-tsa-dv-dv-hv-s-ge-s-di a-da-nv-do-gi ge-sv yi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di.

071026.english: For the earth is the Lord's, and the fulness thereof.
071026.cherokee: ᎡᎶᎯᏰᏃ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏣᎧᎵᎢᎭ.
071026.phonetic: E-lo-hi-ye-no U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-tse-li-ga, a-le na-s-gi na e-lo-hi tsa-ka-li-i-ha.

071027.english: If any of them that believe not bid you to a feast, and ye be disposed to go; whatsoever is set before you, eat, asking no question for conscience sake.
071027.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᏄᏃᎯᏳᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎨᏣᏯᏂᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᏚᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎢᏤᏅᏍᏗᏱ; ᏄᏍᏛᏉ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎢᎬᏱᏗᏢ ᎡᏥᏝᏁᎲ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏱᏣᏛᏛᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᏓᏅᏙᎩ ᎨᏒ ᏱᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
071027.phonetic: I-yu-no gi-lo nu-no-hi-yu-sv-na ge-sv i-ge-tsa-ya-ni-s-ge-s-di, a-le i-tsa-du-li-s-ge-s-di i-tse-nv-s-di-yi; nu-s-dv-quo go-hu-s-di i-gv-yi-di-tlv e-tsi-tla-ne-hv i-tsa-li-s-da-yv-di-s-ge-s-di, a-le tle-s-di go-hu-s-di yi-tsa-dv-dv-hv-s-ge-s-di, a-da-nv-do-gi ge-sv yi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di.

071028.english: But if any man say unto you, This is offered in sacrifice unto idols, eat not for his sake that shewed it, and for conscience sake: for the earth is the Lord's, and the fulness thereof:
071028.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎩᎶ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏥᏪᏎᎮᏍᏗ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᏥᎸ ᏗᎨᎴᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏗᏰᎸᎯ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏥᎩᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓᏅᏙᎩ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᎡᎶᎯᏰᏃ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏣᎧᎵᎢᎭ.
071028.phonetic: I-yu-s-gi-ni gi-lo hi-a ni-tsi-we-se-he-s-di, hi-a na-s-gi a-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi a-tsi-lv di-ge-le-di U-ne-la-nv-hi di-ye-lv-hi, tle-s-di yi-tsi-gi-s-ge-s-di, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di na-s-gi na u-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi ge-sv-i, a-le a-da-nv-do-gi ge-sv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di; e-lo-hi-ye-no U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-tse-li-ga, a-le na-s-gi na e-lo-hi tsa-ka-li-i-ha.

071029.english: Conscience, I say, not thine own, but of the other: for why is my liberty judged of another man's conscience?
071029.cherokee: ᎠᏓᏅᏙᎩ ᎨᏒ ᎦᏗᎭ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᏗᎾ ᏨᏒ ᏣᏓᏅᏙᎩ, ᏐᎢᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏓᏅᏙᎩ; ᎦᏙᏰᏃ ᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎠᏴ ᎢᏯᏆᏛᏁᏗ ᎠᎩᎲ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎤᏓᏅᏙ ᏧᏭᎪᏙᏗ ᏱᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᎭ?
071029.phonetic: A-da-nv-do-gi ge-sv ga-di-ha, v-tla a-di-na tsv-sv tsa-da-nv-do-gi, so-i-s-gi-ni u-da-nv-do-gi; ga-do-ye-no ga-li-s-do-di a-yv i-ya-qua-dv-ne-di a-gi-hv nv-wa-da-le u-da-nv-do tsu-wu-go-do-di yi-ni-ga-li-s-di-ha?

071030.english: For if I by grace be a partaker, why am I evil spoken of for that for which I give thanks?
071030.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎠᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏗ ᏱᎦᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎦ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᎾᏲ ᎥᎩᏃᎮᎭ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᏥᎦᎵᎡᎵᎦ?
071030.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no a-li-he-li-s-di ge-sv gv-di yi-ga-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-ga, ga-do-no na-yo v-gi-no-he-ha nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di na-s-gi na u-gv-wa-li tsi-ga-li-e-li-ga?

071031.english: Whether therefore ye eat, or drink, or whatsoever ye do, do all to the glory of God.
071031.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᏃ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᏗᏔᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎸᏉᏗᏍᎩ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎲᎢ.
071031.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-yu-no i-tsa-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-ge-s-di, a-le i-tsa-di-ta-s-ge-s-di, a-le ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di ni-tsa-dv-ne-he-s-di, U-ne-la-nv-hi u-lv-quo-di-s-gi ge-se-s-di ni-ga-v ni-tsa-dv-ne-hv-i.

071032.english: Give none offence, neither to the Jews, nor to the Gentiles, nor to the church of God:
071032.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᏧᏃᏕᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᏱᏂᏣᎵᏍᏔᏁᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎠᎴ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏛ ᏴᏫ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᎥᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ;
071032.phonetic: Tle-s-di tsu-no-de-s-di-s-gi yi-ni-tsa-li-s-ta-ne-s-di na-s-quo A-ni-tsu-si a-le tsu-na-da-le-dv yv-wi, a-le u-na-da-tlu-gv tsu-na-ne-lo-di U-ne-la-v-hi u-tse-li-ga;

071033.english: Even as I please all men in all things, not seeking mine own profit, but the profit of many, that they may be saved.
071033.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏴ, ᏂᎦᎥ ᏂᎦᏛᏁᎲ ᎾᏂᎥᏉ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎤᏂᏰᎸᏗ ᏥᏂᎦᏥᏯᏛᏁᎰᎢ, ᎾᎩᏲᎲᎾ ᏥᎨᏐ ᎠᏋᏒᏉ ᎠᏆᎵᏍᏕᎩᏙᏗ, ᎤᏂᏣᏘᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᎾᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏓᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎨᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ.
071033.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo a-yv, ni-ga-v ni-ga-dv-ne-hv na-ni-v-quo o-s-dv u-ni-ye-lv-di tsi-ni-ga-tsi-ya-dv-ne-ho-i, na-gi-yo-hv-na tsi-ge-so a-quv-sv-quo a-qua-li-s-de-gi-do-di, u-ni-tsa-ti-s-gi-ni u-na-li-s-de-lv-do-di na-s-gi nv-da-yu-li-s-do-di-yi ge-tsi-s-de-lv-di-yi.

071101.english: Be ye followers of me, even as I also am of Christ.
071101.cherokee: ᎠᏴ ᏍᎩᏍᏓᏩᏕᎩ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏍᏓᏩᏕᎩ ᏥᎩ.
071101.phonetic: A-yv s-gi-s-da-wa-de-gi ge-se-s-di, na-s-gi-ya a-yv na-s-quo Ga-lo-ne-dv tsi-s-da-wa-de-gi tsi-gi.

071102.english: Now I praise you, brethren, that ye remember me in all things, and keep the ordinances, as I delivered them to you.
071102.cherokee: Ꭷ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎢᏨᎸᏉᏗᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎲ ᏍᎩᏯᏅᏓᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᏍᎬ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏕᏨᏲᎯᏎᎸᎢ.
071102.phonetic: Ka, i-da-li-nv-tli, i-tsv-lv-quo-di-ha na-s-gi a-yv ni-ga-v tsu-da-le-nv-dv ni-tsa-dv-ne-hv s-gi-ya-nv-da-di-s-gv-i, a-le i-tsi-s-qua-ni-go-di-s-gv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di na-s-gi-ya de-tsv-yo-hi-se-lv-i.

071103.english: But I would have you know, that the head of every man is Christ; and the head of the woman is the man; and the head of Christ is God.
071103.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏆᏚᎵ ᎢᏥᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᏍᎪᎵ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᎨᏴᏃ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏍᎪᎵ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎦᎶᏁᏛᏃ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᏍᎪᎵ ᎨᏒᎢ.
071103.phonetic: A-le a-qua-du-li i-tsi-ga-do-v-hi-s-di-yi, na-s-gi na-ni-v a-ni-s-ga-ya ge-sv Ga-lo-ne-dv a-s-go-li ge-sv-i; a-ge-yv-no ge-sv a-s-go-li a-s-ga-ya ge-sv-i; Ga-lo-ne-dv-no ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi a-s-go-li ge-sv-i.

071104.english: Every man praying or prophesying, having his head covered, dishonoureth his head.
071104.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᎨᏒ ᏯᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᎭ ᎠᎴ ᏯᏙᎴᎰᏍᎦ, ᎬᏩᎵᏍᏚᎵ, ᎠᏕᎰᎯᏍᏗᏍᎪ ᎠᏍᎪᎵ ᎨᏒᎢ.
071104.phonetic: Gi-lo a-ni-s-ga-ya ge-sv ya-da-do-li-s-di-ha a-le ya-do-le-ho-s-ga, gv-wa-li-s-du-li, a-de-ho-hi-s-di-s-go a-s-go-li ge-sv-i.

071105.english: But every woman that prayeth or prophesieth with her head uncovered dishonoureth her head: for that is even all one as if she were shaven.
071105.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏂᎨᏴ ᎨᏒ ᏯᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᎭ ᎠᎴ ᏯᏙᎴᎰᏍᎦ ᏄᎵᏍᏚᎸᎾ, ᎠᏕᎰᎯᏍᏗᏍᎪ ᎠᏍᎪᎵ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᏧᎵᏍᏙᏴᎰᏉᏰᏃ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ.
071105.phonetic: Gi-lo-s-gi-ni a-ni-ge-yv ge-sv ya-da-do-li-s-di-ha a-le ya-do-le-ho-s-ga nu-li-s-du-lv-na, a-de-ho-hi-s-di-s-go a-s-go-li ge-sv-i; tsu-li-s-do-yv-ho-quo-ye-no i-tsu-la-ha na-s-gi.

071106.english: For if the woman be not covered, let her also be shorn: but if it be a shame for a woman to be shorn or shaven, let her be covered.
071106.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎠᎨᏴ ᏄᎵᏍᏚᎸᎾ ᏱᎩ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏥᏍᏙᏰᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏕᎰᎯᏍᏗᏳ ᏱᎩ ᎠᎨᏴ ᏗᎵᏍᏙᏰᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎵᏍᏙᏰᏗ ᎤᏮᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᎵᏍᏙᏰᏗᏱ, ᎬᏩᎵᏍᏚᎴᏍᏗᏉ.
071106.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no a-ge-yv nu-li-s-du-lv-na yi-gi, na-s-quo a-tsi-s-do-ye-s-ge-s-di; i-yu-s-gi-ni u-de-ho-hi-s-di-yu yi-gi a-ge-yv di-li-s-do-ye-di a-le a-li-s-do-ye-di u-wv-do-di-yi u-li-s-do-ye-di-yi, gv-wa-li-s-du-le-s-di-quo.

071107.english: For a man indeed ought not to cover his head, forasmuch as he is the image and glory of God: but the woman is the glory of the man.
071107.cherokee: ᎠᏍᎦᏯᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎥᏝ ᏱᎬᎵᏍᏚᎸᏍᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏧᏄᏬᏍᏗ; ᎠᎨᏴᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏄᏬᏍᏗ.
071107.phonetic: A-s-ga-ya-s-gi-ni u-do-hi-yu-hi v-tla yi-gv-li-s-du-lv-s-ga, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi na-s-gi-ya tsi-gi, a-le na-s-gi ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv tsu-nu-wo-s-di; a-ge-yv-s-gi-ni a-s-ga-ya ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv u-nu-wo-s-di.

071108.english: For the man is not of the woman; but the woman of the man.
071108.cherokee: ᎠᏍᎦᏯᏰᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎠᎨᏴᎯ ᏴᏧᏓᎴᏁ ᎠᎪᏢᏅ; ᎠᎨᏴᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏍᎦᏲᎯ ᏧᏓᎴᏁ ᎠᎪᏢᏅ.
071108.phonetic: A-s-ga-ya-ye-no v-tla a-ge-yv-hi yv-tsu-da-le-ne a-go-tlv-nv; a-ge-yv-s-gi-ni a-s-ga-yo-hi tsu-da-le-ne a-go-tlv-nv.

071109.english: Neither was the man created for the woman; but the woman for the man.
071109.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎥᏝ ᎠᎨᏴ ᏯᎪᏢᎾᏁᎴᎢ, ᎠᎨᏴᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎠᎪᏢᎾᏁᎴᎢ.
071109.phonetic: A-le na-s-quo a-s-ga-ya v-tla a-ge-yv ya-go-tlv-na-ne-le-i, a-ge-yv-s-gi-ni a-s-ga-ya a-go-tlv-na-ne-le-i.

071110.english: For this cause ought the woman to have power on her head because of the angels.
071110.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᎨᏴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎢᏳᏩᏁᎯ ᏳᏭᏢᏗ ᎠᏍᎪᎵ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏱᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ.
071110.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di a-ge-yv ga-lv-quo-di-yu i-yu-wa-ne-hi yu-wu-tlv-di a-s-go-li na-s-gi ge-tsi-nv-si-dv ge-sv yi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha.

071111.english: Nevertheless neither is the man without the woman, neither the woman without the man, in the Lord.
071111.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᏂᎨᏴ ᏔᎵ ᏄᏛᏛᎾ ᏰᎭ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎨᏴ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᏔᎵ ᏄᏛᏛᎾ ᏰᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏄᏩᎾᏅᎢ.
071111.phonetic: A-se-s-gi-ni-no-nv v-tla a-s-ga-ya ni-ge-yv ta-li nu-dv-dv-na ye-ha, v-tla a-le a-ge-yv a-s-ga-ya ta-li nu-dv-dv-na ye-ha na-s-gi U-gv-wi-yu-hi nu-wa-na-nv-i.

071112.english: For as the woman is of the man, even so is the man also by the woman; but all things of god.
071112.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎠᎨᏴ ᎠᏍᎦᏲᎯ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎠᎨᏴ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ.
071112.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no a-ge-yv a-s-ga-yo-hi nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi tsi-gi, na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo a-s-ga-ya a-ge-yv u-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi; a-se-no ni-ga-di-yu tsu-da-le-nv-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi ge-sv nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi.

071113.english: Judge in yourselves: is it comely that a woman pray unto God uncovered?
071113.cherokee: ᏗᏧᎪᏓ ᎢᏨᏒ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎤᎵᎶᎲᏍᎦᏍᎪ ᎠᎨᏴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏯᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁ ᏄᎵᏍᏚᎸᎾ?
071113.phonetic: Di-tsu-go-da i-tsv-sv ge-sv-i; u-li-lo-hv-s-ga-s-go a-ge-yv U-ne-la-nv-hi ya-da-do-li-s-da-ne nu-li-s-du-lv-na?

071114.english: Doth not even nature itself teach you, that, if a man have long hair, it is a shame unto him?
071114.cherokee: ᏝᏍᎪ ᎢᏨᏒ ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎲ ᏱᏤᏲᎲᏍᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᏚᏯ ᎦᏅᎯᏛ ᏳᏍᏘᏰᎦ ᎤᏕᎰᎯᏍᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ?
071114.phonetic: Tla-s-go i-tsv-sv i-tsi-ga-ta-hv yi-tse-yo-hv-s-ga, na-s-gi a-s-du-ya ga-nv-hi-dv yu-s-ti-ye-ga u-de-ho-hi-s-di-yu ge-sv-i?

071115.english: But if a woman have long hair, it is a glory to her: for her hair is given her for a covering.
071115.cherokee: ᎠᎨᏴᏍᎩᏂ ᎦᏅᎯᏛ ᏳᏍᏘᏰᎦ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎢᏳᏩᏁᎯ ᎨᏐᎢ; ᎤᏍᏘᏰᎬᏰᏃ ᎠᏥᏁᎸ ᎤᎦᏢᏙᏗ.
071115.phonetic: A-ge-yv-s-gi-ni ga-nv-hi-dv yu-s-ti-ye-ga ga-lv-quo-di-yu i-yu-wa-ne-hi ge-so-i; u-s-ti-ye-gv-ye-no a-tsi-ne-lv u-ga-tlv-do-di.

071116.english: But if any man seem to be contentious, we have no such custom, neither the churches of God.
071116.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏗᏒᏌᏘ ᏱᏅᏩᏍᏗ; ^ᎠᏴ ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏲᎦᏛᏁᏗ ᏲᎩᎭ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᏚᎾᏓᏡᏩᏗᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏤᎵᎦ.
071116.phonetic: I-yu-s-gi-ni gi-lo u-di-sv-sa-ti yi-nv-wa-s-di; ^a-yv v-tla na-s-gi i-yo-ga-dv-ne-di yo-gi-ha, v-tla a-le na-s-quo tsu-na-ne-lo-di du-na-da-tlu-wa-di-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-tse-li-ga.

071117.english: Now in this that I declare unto you I praise you not, that ye come together not for the better, but for the worse.
071117.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏍᎩᏂᏃ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎲ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏨᎸᏉᏗᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏕᏥᎳᏫᏦᎯᎲ ᎥᏝ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᏱᎨᏐᎢ, ᎤᏲᏉᏍᎩᏂ.
071117.phonetic: Hi-a-s-gi-ni-no ni-tsv-we-se-hv v-tla yi-tsv-lv-quo-di-ha, na-s-gi de-tsi-la-wi-tso-hi-hv v-tla o-s-dv i-yu-li-s-do-di yi-ge-so-i, u-yo-quo-s-gi-ni.

071118.english: For first of all, when ye come together in the church, I hear that there be divisions among you; and I partly believe it.
071118.cherokee: ᎢᎬᏱᏱᏰᏃ ᎨᏒ ᏕᏥᎳᏫᎩ ᎢᏣᏓᏡᎬ ᎢᎸᏍᎩ ᏂᏣᏓᏗᏍᎬ ᎦᏛᎩᎭ; ᎠᎴ ᎪᎢᏳᎲᏍᎦᏉ ᎢᎦᏛ.
071118.phonetic: I-gv-yi-yi-ye-no ge-sv de-tsi-la-wi-gi i-tsa-da-tlu-gv i-lv-s-gi ni-tsa-da-di-s-gv ga-dv-gi-ha; a-le go-i-yu-hv-s-ga-quo i-ga-dv.

071119.english: For there must be also heresies among you, that they which are approved may be made manifest among you.
071119.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏰᏃ ᎢᎸᏍᎩ ᎢᏣᏓᏗᏍᏗ ᏂᎯ ᏂᏣᏛᏅᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎨᏥᏰᎸᏅᎯ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏂᎯ ᏂᏣᏛᏅᎢ.
071119.phonetic: A-se-ye-no i-lv-s-gi i-tsa-da-di-s-di ni-hi ni-tsa-dv-nv-i, na-s-gi o-si-yu ge-tsi-ye-lv-nv-hi gv-ni-ge-sv i-yu-na-li-s-do-di-yi ni-hi ni-tsa-dv-nv-i.

071120.english: When ye come together therefore into one place, this is not to eat the Lord's supper.
071120.cherokee: ᏕᏥᎳᏫᎩᏰᏃ ᎢᎸᎯᏢᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗ ᏱᏣᎵᏍᏓᏴᏂᎰᎢ.
071120.phonetic: De-tsi-la-wi-gi-ye-no i-lv-hi-tlv-i, v-tla U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-tse-li a-li-s-da-yv-di yi-tsa-li-s-da-yv-ni-ho-i.

071121.english: For in eating every one taketh before other his own supper: and one is hungry, and another is drunken.
071121.cherokee: ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏗᏴᎲᏍᎬᏰᏃ ᎢᏥᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎢᏥᎩᏍᎪ ᎢᏨᏒ ᎢᏣᏤᎵᎦ; ᎠᏏᏴᏫᏃ ᎠᎪᏄ ᎤᏲᏏᏍᎪᎢ, ᏅᏩᏓᎴᏃ ᎤᏴᏍᏕᏍᎪᎢ.
071121.phonetic: I-tsa-li-s-di-yv-hv-s-gv-ye-no i-tsi-si-yv-wi-ha ge-sv i-gv-yi i-tsi-gi-s-go i-tsv-sv i-tsa-tse-li-ga; a-si-yv-wi-no a-go-nu u-yo-si-s-go-i, nv-wa-da-le-no u-yv-s-de-s-go-i.

071122.english: What? have ye not houses to eat and to drink in? or despise ye the church of God, and shame them that have not? What shall I say to you? shall I praise you in this? I praise you not.
071122.cherokee: ᏝᏍᎪᏃ ᏱᏗᏥᏁᎸ ᎾᎿᎭᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏔᏗᏔᏍᏗᏱ?  ᏥᎪᎨ ᎢᏥᏐᏢᏗᎭ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᏣᏕᎰᎯᏍᏗᎭ ᏄᏂᎲᎾ?  ᎦᏙ ᏓᏨᏲᏎᎵ?  ᏓᏨᎸᏉᏔᏂᏧ?  ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏛᏁᎲ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏨᎸᏉᏗᎭ.
071122.phonetic: Tla-s-go-no yi-di-tsi-ne-lv na-hna i-tsa-li-s-da-yv-di-yi a-le i-ta-di-ta-s-di-yi?  tsi-go-ge i-tsi-so-tlv-di-ha tsu-na-ne-lo-di u-na-da-tlu-gv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga, a-le de-tsa-de-ho-hi-s-di-ha nu-ni-hv-na?  ga-do da-tsv-yo-se-li?  da-tsv-lv-quo-ta-ni-tsu?  hi-a ni-tsv-dv-ne-hv v-tla yi-tsv-lv-quo-di-ha.

071123.english: For I have received of the Lord that which also I delivered unto you, That the Lord Jesus the same night in which he was betrayed took bread:
071123.cherokee: ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏰᏃ ᏓᎩᏲᎯᏎᎸᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏥᏕᏨᏲᎯᏎᎸᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᏒᏃᏱ ᎠᏥᎶᏄᎡᎸ, ᎦᏚ ᎤᎩᏎᎢ;
071123.phonetic: U-gv-wi-yu-hi-ye-no da-gi-yo-hi-se-lv-gi na-s-gi na-s-quo tsi-de-tsv-yo-hi-se-lv-gi, na-s-gi na U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa, na-hi-yu sv-no-yi a-tsi-lo-nu-e-lv, ga-du u-gi-se-i;

071124.english: And when he had given thanks, he brake it, and said, Take, eat: this is my body, which is broken for you: this do in remembrance of me.
071124.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᎵᎮᎵᏨ, ᎤᎬᎭᎷᏰᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎢᏥᎩ, ᎢᏥᎦ; ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᏥᏰᎸᎢ, ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏣᎵᎬᎭᎷᏰᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ; ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᏴ ᏍᎩᏯᏅᏓᏗᏍᎬᎢ.
071124.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no u-li-he-li-tsv, u-gv-ha-lu-ye-i, a-le hi-a nu-we-se-i, I-tsi-gi, i-tsi-ga; hi-a na-s-gi a-yv tsi-ye-lv-i, ni-hi na-s-gi i-tsa-li-gv-ha-lu-ye-lv-hi tsi-gi; hi-a na-s-gi ni-tsa-dv-ne-he-s-di a-yv s-gi-ya-nv-da-di-s-gv-i.

071125.english: After the same manner also he took the cup, when he had supped, saying, This cup is the new testament in my blood: this do ye, as oft as ye drink it, in remembrance of me.
071125.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏄᏛᏁᎴ ᎤᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏃᏅ, ᎤᎵᏍᏈᏗ ᎤᎩᏎᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏤ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏓᏠᎯᏍᏛᎢ, ᎠᏴ ᎠᎩᎩᎬ ᏨᏛᏍᏓᏱᏗ; ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ, ᎢᏳᏍᏗᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏣᏗᏔᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᏴ ᏍᎩᏯᏅᏓᏗᏍᎬᎢ.
071125.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo nu-dv-ne-le u-na-li-s-da-yv-no-nv, u-li-s-qui-di u-gi-se-i, hi-a nu-we-se-i; Hi-a na-s-gi i-tse ka-no-he-dv da-tlo-hi-s-dv-i, a-yv a-gi-gi-gv tsv-dv-s-da-yi-di; hi-a na-s-gi ni-tsa-dv-ne-he-s-di, i-yu-s-di-ha na-s-gi i-tsa-di-ta-s-ge-s-di a-yv s-gi-ya-nv-da-di-s-gv-i.

071126.english: For as often as ye eat this bread, and drink this cup, ye do shew the Lord's death till he come.
071126.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏍᏗᎭᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏚ ᎢᏥᎩᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎵᏍᏈᏗ ᎢᏣᏗᏔᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏂᏨᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏲᎱᏒᎢ, ᎬᏂ ᎦᎷᏨᎭ.
071126.phonetic: I-yu-s-di-ha-ye-no hi-a na-s-gi ga-du i-tsi-gi-s-ge-s-di, a-le hi-a na-s-gi u-li-s-qui-di i-tsa-di-ta-s-ge-s-di, gv-ni-ge-sv ni-tsv-ne-he-s-di U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-yo-hu-sv-i, gv-ni ga-lu-tsv-ha.

071127.english: Wherefore whosoever shall eat this bread, and drink this cup of the Lord, unworthily, shall be guilty of the body and blood of the Lord.
071127.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎩᎶ ᏂᏚᏳᎪᏛᎾ ᎾᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᎩᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᎦᏚ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏗᏔᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᎤᎵᏍᏈᏗ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎠᏍᎦᏅᏤᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᏰᎸ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎩᎬ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ.
071127.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di, gi-lo ni-du-yu-go-dv-na na-dv-ne-he-s-di a-gi-s-ge-s-di hi-a ga-du, a-le a-di-ta-s-ge-s-di hi-a u-li-s-qui-di U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-tse-li-ga, a-s-ga-nv-tse-he-s-di a-ye-lv a-le u-gi-gv U-gv-wi-yu-hi.

071128.english: But let a man examine himself, and so let him eat of that bread, and drink of that cup.
071128.cherokee: ᎤᏩᏒᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏓᎪᎵᏰᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏴᏫ, ᎩᎳᏃ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎠᎩᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏚ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏗᏔᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎵᏍᏈᏗ.
071128.phonetic: U-wa-sv-s-gi-ni a-da-go-li-ye-s-ge-s-di yv-wi, gi-la-no hna-quo a-gi-s-ge-s-di na-s-gi ga-du, a-le a-di-ta-s-ge-s-di na-s-gi u-li-s-qui-di.

071129.english: For he that eateth and drinketh unworthily, eateth and drinketh damnation to himself, not discerning the Lord's body.
071129.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏰᏃ ᏂᏚᏳᎪᏛᎾ ᎾᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᎩᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏗᏔᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎩᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏗᏔᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏧᏭᎪᏓᏁᎯ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ, ᎾᎪᏩᏘᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᏰᎸᎢ.
071129.phonetic: Gi-lo-ye-no ni-du-yu-go-dv-na na-dv-ne-he-s-di a-gi-s-ge-s-di a-le a-di-ta-s-ge-s-di, na-s-gi a-gi-s-ge-s-di a-le a-di-ta-s-ge-s-di tsu-wu-go-da-ne-hi u-wa-sv u-s-ga-nv-tsv-i, na-go-wa-ti-s-gv-na ge-sv U-gv-wi-yu-hi a-ye-lv-i.

071130.english: For this cause many are weak and sickly among you, and many sleep.
071130.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎤᏂᏣᏔ ᎨᏣᏓᏑᏯ ᏗᏂᏩᎾᎦᎳ ᎠᎴ ᏧᏂᏢᏥᏰᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏰᎵ ᎤᏂᏣᏔ ᎠᏂᎵᎾᎠ.
071130.phonetic: Na-s-gi nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha u-ni-tsa-ta ge-tsa-da-su-ya di-ni-wa-na-ga-la a-le tsu-ni-tlv-tsi-ye-s-gi, a-le ye-li u-ni-tsa-ta a-ni-li-na-a.

071131.english: For if we would judge ourselves, we should not be judged.

071132.english: But when we are judged, we are chastened of the Lord, that we should not be condemned with the world.
071132.cherokee: ᏕᎫᎪᏓᏏᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᎩᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗᏍᎪ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᏕᎨᎫᎪᏓᏁᎲ ᎢᎦᏠᏯᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
071132.phonetic: De-gu-go-da-si-s-gi-ni U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-gi-gi-li-yo-i-s-di-s-go na-s-gi e-lo-hi u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv de-ge-gu-go-da-ne-hv i-ga-tlo-ya-s-do-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na.

071133.english: Wherefore, my brethren, when ye come together to eat, tarry one for another.
071133.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏥᏄᏍᏗ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᏕᏥᎳᏫᎨᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ, ᏕᏣᏓᎦᏘᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
071133.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no tsi-nu-s-di, i-da-li-nv-tli, i-yu-no de-tsi-la-wi-ge-s-di i-tsa-li-s-da-yv-di-yi, de-tsa-da-ga-ti-di-s-ge-s-di.

071134.english: And if any man hunger, let him eat at home; that ye come not together unto condemnation. And the rest will I set in order when I come.
071134.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎢᏳ ᎩᎶ ᎠᎪᎾ ᎤᏲᏏᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᏧᏪᏅᏒ ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏕᏥᎳᏫᎩ ᎢᏥᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᏗᏧᎪᏓᏁᎯᏉ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.  ᏭᏃᏒᏃ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏂᎬᏁᎸᎭ ᏫᏥᎷᏨᎭ.
071134.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no i-yu gi-lo a-go-na u-yo-si-s-ge-s-di, tsu-we-nv-sv a-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-ge-s-di; na-s-gi de-tsi-la-wi-gi i-tsi-s-ga-nv-tsv di-tsu-go-da-ne-hi-quo i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na.  Wu-no-sv-no o-s-dv ni-gv-ne-lv-ha wi-tsi-lu-tsv-ha.

071201.english: Now concerning spiritual gifts, brethren, I would not have you ignorant.
071201.cherokee: ᎾᏃ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎥᏝ ᎾᏂᎦᏔᎲᎾ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᏱᏨᏰᎵᏎᎭ.
071201.phonetic: Na-no a-da-nv-do u-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi u-gv-wa-li, i-da-li-nv-tli, v-tla na-ni-ga-ta-hv-na ge-se-s-di, yi-tsv-ye-li-se-ha.

071202.english: Ye know that ye were Gentiles, carried away unto these dumb idols, even as ye were led.
071202.cherokee: ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏥᎦᏔᎾᎥᎾ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ, ᏥᏕᏥᏍᏓᏩᏗᏒᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏅᎨᏫ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏗᏰᎸᎯ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏥᏕᏣᏘᏂᏙᎲᎩ.
071202.phonetic: I-tsi-ga-ta-ha na-s-gi ni-tsi-ga-ta-na-v-na tsi-ge-sv-gi, tsi-de-tsi-s-da-wa-di-sv-gi hi-a na-s-gi tsu-nv-ge-wi u-ne-la-nv-hi di-ye-lv-hi na-s-gi-ya tsi-de-tsa-ti-ni-do-hv-gi.

071203.english: Wherefore I give you to understand, that no man speaking by the Spirit of God calleth Jesus accursed: and that no man can say that Jesus is the Lord, but by the Holy Ghost.
071203.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏨᏃᎮᎮᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏅᏙ ᏱᎬᏗ ᏱᎦᏬᏂᎭ, ᏥᏌ ᎠᏥᏍᎩᏅᏛᎯ ᎥᏝ ᏰᎵ ᏴᎬᏛ; ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᏥᏌ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏴᎬᏛ, ᎬᏂ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᏱᎬᏗᎭ.
071203.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no i-yu-s-di i-tsv-no-he-he-ha, na-s-gi gi-lo U-ne-la-nv-hi U-da-nv-do yi-gv-di yi-ga-wo-ni-ha, Tsi-sa a-tsi-s-gi-nv-dv-hi v-tla ye-li yv-gv-dv; v-tla a-le gi-lo Tsi-sa U-gv-wi-yu-hi yv-gv-dv, gv-ni Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do yi-gv-di-ha.

071204.english: Now there are diversities of gifts, but the same Spirit.
071204.cherokee: ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎠᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᏍᎩᏉ ᏌᏉ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ.
071204.phonetic: Tsu-da-le-nv-dv-s-gi-ni-no-nv di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di a-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi, a-se-no na-s-gi-quo sa-quo A-da-nv-do.

071205.english: And there are differences of administrations, but the same Lord.
071205.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᏍᎩᏉ ᏌᏉ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ.
071205.phonetic: A-le tsu-da-le-nv-dv di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv-i, a-se-no na-s-gi-quo sa-quo U-gv-wi-yu-hi.

071206.english: And there are diversities of operations, but it is the same God which worketh all in all.
071206.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏗᎬᏩᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎢᎨᎬᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᏍᎩᏉ ᏌᏉ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎬᏩᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎢᎨᎬᏁᎯ ᎾᏂᎥᎢ.
071206.phonetic: A-le tsu-da-le-nv-dv di-gv-wa-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di i-ge-gv-ne-di ge-sv-i, a-se-no na-s-gi-quo sa-quo U-ne-la-nv-hi ni-ga-dv na-s-gi di-gv-wa-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di i-ge-gv-ne-hi na-ni-v-i.

071207.english: But the manifestation of the Spirit is given to every man to profit withal.
071207.cherokee: ᎬᏂᎨᏒᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᎬᏁᎲ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎠᏂᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᎨᏥᏁᎭ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎤᏅᏙᏗᏱ.
071207.phonetic: Gv-ni-ge-sv-s-gi-ni ni-gv-ne-hv A-da-nv-do a-ni-si-yv-wi-ha ge-tsi-ne-ha go-hu-s-di o-s-dv u-nv-do-di-yi.

071208.english: For to one is given by the Spirit the word of wisdom; to another the word of knowledge by the same Spirit;
071208.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏴᏫᏰᏃ ᎤᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏐ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎠᏏᎾᏍᏛ ᎤᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗᏱ; ᏅᏩᏓᎴᏃ ᎠᎦᏔᎾᎢ ᎢᎦᎦᏛ ᎤᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩᏉ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏐᎢ;
071208.phonetic: A-si-yv-wi-ye-no u-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-lv-hi ge-so A-da-nv-do a-si-na-s-dv u-wo-ni-hi-s-di-yi; nv-wa-da-le-no a-ga-ta-na-i i-ga-ga-dv u-wo-ni-hi-s-di-yi na-s-gi-quo A-da-nv-do u-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-lv-hi ge-so-i;

071209.english: To another faith by the same Spirit; to another the gifts of healing by the same Spirit;
071209.cherokee: ᏅᏩᏓᎴᏃ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩᏉ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏐᎢ; ᏅᏩᏓᎴᏃ ᎠᏥᏁᎰ ᏧᏓᏅᏬᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩᏉ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏐᎢ;
071209.phonetic: Nv-wa-da-le-no go-hi-yu-di ge-sv na-s-gi-quo A-da-nv-do u-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-lv-hi ge-so-i; nv-wa-da-le-no a-tsi-ne-ho tsu-da-nv-wo-di-yi, na-s-gi-quo A-da-nv-do u-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-lv-hi ge-so-i;

071210.english: To another the working of miracles; to another prophecy; to another discerning of spirits; to another divers kinds of tongues; to another the interpretation of tongues:
071210.cherokee: ᏅᏩᏓᎴᏃ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ; ᏅᏩᏓᎴᏃ ᎤᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏗᏱ; ᏅᏩᏓᎴᏃ ᏗᏓᏅᏙ ᏄᎾᏍᏛ ᏧᎪᎵᏰᏗᏱ; ᏅᏩᏓᎴᏃ ᎢᎸᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᎩ ᏧᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗᏱ; ᏅᏩᏓᎴᏃ ᏧᏁᏢᏙᏗᏱ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏗᎦᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ;
071210.phonetic: Nv-wa-da-le-no u-s-qua-ni-go-di tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di-yi; nv-wa-da-le-no u-do-le-ho-hi-s-di-yi; nv-wa-da-le-no di-da-nv-do nu-na-s-dv tsu-go-li-ye-di-yi; nv-wa-da-le-no i-lv-s-gi i-yu-da-le-gi tsu-wo-ni-hi-s-di-yi; nv-wa-da-le-no tsu-ne-tlv-do-di-yi tsu-da-le-nv-dv di-ga-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv-i;

071211.english: But all these worketh that one and the selfsame Spirit, dividing to every man severally as he will.
071211.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎾᏍᎩᏉ ᏌᏉ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᏕᎤᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎰᎢ, ᏓᏯᏙᎮᎰ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏧᎾᏁᎳᎩᎭ ᏧᎾᏤᎵ, ᎯᎠᏉ ᏄᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎡᎵᏍᎬᎢ.
071211.phonetic: A-se-no hi-a na-s-gi ni-ga-dv tsu-da-le-nv-dv na-s-gi-quo sa-quo A-da-nv-do de-u-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ho-i, da-ya-do-he-ho na-ni-v tsu-na-ne-la-gi-ha tsu-na-tse-li, hi-a-quo nu-s-de-s-di e-li-s-gv-i.

071212.english: For as the body is one, and hath many members, and all the members of that one body, being many, are one body: so also is Christ.
071212.cherokee: ᎠᏰᎸᏰᏃ ᏌᏉᏉ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏥᏚᏫᏞᏫᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏌᏉ ᎠᏰᎸ ᏚᏫᏞᏫᏒ, ᎤᏣᏘ ᎨᏒ, ᏌᏉᏉ ᎠᏰᎸ ᏥᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᎭ; ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏄᏍᏗ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ.
071212.phonetic: A-ye-lv-ye-no sa-quo-quo tsi-gi, a-le u-tsa-ti tsi-du-wi-tle-wi-sv, a-le ni-ga-dv na-s-gi sa-quo a-ye-lv du-wi-tle-wi-sv, u-tsa-ti ge-sv, sa-quo-quo a-ye-lv tsi-ni-ga-li-s-di-ha; na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo nu-s-di Ga-lo-ne-dv.

071213.english: For by one Spirit are we all baptized into one body, whether we be Jews or Gentiles, whether we be bond or free; and have been all made to drink into one Spirit.
071213.cherokee: ᏌᏉᎯᏰᏃ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ ᏂᏗᎥ ᏤᎦᏬᎥᎯ ᏌᏉ ᎠᏰᎸ ᎢᏰᎬᏁᎸᎯ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏗᏧᏏ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎦᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᏱᎩ; ᎾᏍᏉ ᏤᎩᎾᏝᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏤᎩᎾᏝᎢ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏱᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᏂᏗᎥ ᏌᏉᏉ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎢᎦᏗᏔᏍᏗᏱ ᎢᏰᎬᏁᎸᎯ.
071213.phonetic: Sa-quo-hi-ye-no A-da-nv-do i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv ni-di-v tse-ga-wo-v-hi sa-quo a-ye-lv i-ye-gv-ne-lv-hi, na-s-quo I-di-tsu-si a-le di-ga-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi yi-gi; na-s-quo tse-gi-na-tla-i a-le tse-gi-na-tla-i ni-ge-sv-na yi-gi; a-le ni-di-v sa-quo-quo A-da-nv-do i-ga-di-ta-s-di-yi i-ye-gv-ne-lv-hi.

071214.english: For the body is not one member, but many.
071214.cherokee: ᎠᏰᎸᏰᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏌᏉᏉ ᎤᏫᏞᏫᏒ ᏱᎩ, ᎤᏣᏘᏍᎩᏂ ᏚᏫᏞᏫᏒᎢ.
071214.phonetic: A-ye-lv-ye-no v-tla sa-quo-quo u-wi-tle-wi-sv yi-gi, u-tsa-ti-s-gi-ni du-wi-tle-wi-sv-i.

071215.english: If the foot shall say, Because I am not the hand, I am not of the body; is it therefore not of the body?
071215.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎣᎳᏏᏕᏂ ᎯᎠ ᏱᏄᏪᏒ, ᎠᏴ ᎤᏬᏰᏂ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎩ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏰᎸ ᏯᏆᏘᏝ, ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎪ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏰᎸ ᏳᏘᏝ?
071215.phonetic: I-yu-no o-la-si-de-ni hi-a yi-nu-we-sv, A-yv u-wo-ye-ni ni-ge-sv-na tsi-gi v-tla a-ye-lv ya-qua-ti-tla, na-s-gi-s-go nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha v-tla a-ye-lv yu-ti-tla?

071216.english: And if the ear shall say, Because I am not the eye, I am not of the body; is it therefore not of the body?
071216.cherokee: ᎢᏳ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎦᎴᏂ ᎯᎠ ᏱᏄᏪᏒ, ᎠᏴ ᎠᎦᏔ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎩ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏰᎸ ᏯᏆᏘᏝ; ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎪ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏰᎸ ᏳᏘᏝ?
071216.phonetic: I-yu a-le a-ga-le-ni hi-a yi-nu-we-sv, A-yv a-ga-ta ni-ge-sv-na tsi-gi v-tla a-ye-lv ya-qua-ti-tla; na-s-gi-s-go, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha v-tla a-ye-lv yu-ti-tla?

071217.english: If the whole body were an eye, where were the hearing? If the whole were hearing, where were the smelling?
071217.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᏂᎬ ᎠᏰᎸ ᎠᎦᏔ ᏱᎩ, ᎭᏢ ᎠᏛᎪᏙᏗ ᏱᎩ?  ᎢᏳᏃ ᏂᎬ ᎠᏛᎪᏙᏗ ᏱᎩ, ᎭᏢ ᎣᏪᏩᏒᎢᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏱᎩ?
071217.phonetic: I-yu-no ni-gv a-ye-lv a-ga-ta yi-gi, ha-tlv a-dv-go-do-di yi-gi?  i-yu-no ni-gv a-dv-go-do-di yi-gi, ha-tlv o-we-wa-sv-i-s-do-di-yi yi-gi?

071218.english: But now hath God set the members every one of them in the body, as it hath pleased him.
071218.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏚᏫᏞᏫᏒ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏌᏉᎭ ᎨᏒ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏰᎸ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏰᎸᏅᎢ.
071218.phonetic: A-se-no U-ne-la-nv-hi du-wi-tle-wi-sv ni-ga-dv sa-quo-ha ge-sv na-hna a-ye-lv na-s-gi-ya o-si-yu u-ye-lv-nv-i.

071219.english: And if they were all one member, where were the body?
071219.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏌᏉᏉ ᎤᏫᏢ ᏱᎩ, ᎭᏢ ᎠᏰᎸ ᏱᎩ?
071219.phonetic: I-yu-no ni-ga-dv sa-quo-quo u-wi-tlv yi-gi, ha-tlv a-ye-lv yi-gi?

071220.english: But now are they many members, yet but one body.

071221.english: And the eye cannot say unto the hand, I have no need of thee: nor again the head to the feet, I have no need of you.
071221.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᎦᏔ ᎥᏝ ᎯᎠ ᎢᎬᏩᏪᏎᏗ ᏱᎩ ᎤᏬᏰᏂ, ᎥᏝ ᏱᎬᏯᏚᎵᎭ; ᎠᎴᏬ ᎠᏍᎪᎵ ᎥᏝ ᎯᎠ ᎢᏗᎬᏩᏪᏎᏗ ᏱᎩ ᏧᎳᏏᏕᏂ, ᎥᏝ ᏱᏗᏍᏛᏯᏑᎵᎭ.
071221.phonetic: A-le a-ga-ta v-tla hi-a i-gv-wa-we-se-di yi-gi u-wo-ye-ni, v-tla yi-gv-ya-du-li-ha; a-le-wo a-s-go-li v-tla hi-a i-di-gv-wa-we-se-di yi-gi tsu-la-si-de-ni, v-tla yi-di-s-dv-ya-su-li-ha.

071222.english: Nay, much more those members of the body, which seem to be more feeble, are necessary:
071222.cherokee: ᎥᏝ, ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏰᎸ ᏤᎯ ᎤᏟ ᎢᏗᏩᎾᎦᎳ ᏥᏅᏩᏍᏙᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏟ ᎤᎵᏍᎨᏛ ᎨᏐᎢ.
071222.phonetic: V-tla, na-s-gi-s-gi-ni a-ye-lv tse-hi u-tli i-di-wa-na-ga-la tsi-nv-wa-s-do-i, na-s-gi u-tli u-li-s-ge-dv ge-so-i.

071223.english: And those members of the body, which we think to be less honourable, upon these we bestow more abundant honour; and our uncomely parts have more abundant comeliness.
071223.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏰᎸ ᏤᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏍᎦ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎢᏗᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᎢᎩᏰᎸᏒ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏟ ᎢᏗᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᏂᏕᏛᏁᎰᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᏄᏬᏚᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᏂᎦᏛᏅᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏟ ᎤᏬᏚᎯᏳ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᏍᎪᎢ;
071223.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi a-ye-lv tse-hi na-s-gi e-s-ga i-yv-dv i-di-ga-lv-quo-di i-gi-ye-lv-sv, na-s-gi u-tli i-di-ga-lv-quo-di ni-de-dv-ne-ho-i; a-le nu-wo-du-sv-na ge-sv ni-ga-dv-nv-i na-s-gi u-tli u-wo-du-hi-yu ni-ga-li-s-di-s-go-i;

071224.english: For our comely parts have no need: but God hath tempered the body together, having given more abundant honour to that part which lacked:
071224.cherokee: ᎤᏬᏚᎯᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᎦᏛᏅᎢ ᎥᏝ ᏳᏂᎬᎪᎢ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏚᏭᏓᏔᏂᏙᎸ ᎠᏰᎸᎢ, ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏄᏩᏁᎸ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᎡᏍᎦ ᎨᏒᎢ;
071224.phonetic: U-wo-du-hi-yu-s-gi-ni ni-ga-dv-nv-i v-tla yu-ni-gv-go-i; U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni du-wu-da-ta-ni-do-lv a-ye-lv-i, u-tli i-ga-i ga-lv-quo-di-yu nu-wa-ne-lv na-s-gi na-hna e-s-ga ge-sv-i;

071225.english: That there should be no schism in the body; but that the members should have the same care one for another.
071225.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏰᎸ ᎢᎸᎯᏢ ᏧᎦᎴᏅᏛ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᏫᏞᏫᏒ ᏧᎾᏓᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
071225.phonetic: Na-s-gi na-hna a-ye-lv i-lv-hi-tlv tsu-ga-le-nv-dv ni-ge-sv-na i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi; na-s-gi du-wi-tle-wi-sv tsu-na-da-s-qua-ni-go-di-yu i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

071226.english: And whether one member suffer, all the members suffer with it; or one member be honoured, all the members rejoice with it.
071226.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏃ ᏌᏉ ᎤᏫᏢ ᏯᎩᎵᏲᎦ, ᏂᎦᏛ ᏚᏫᏢ ᎤᎾᏠᏯᏍᏗᎭ ᎠᏂᎩᎵᏲᎦ; ᎠᎴ ᎢᏳ ᏌᏉ ᎤᏫᏢ ᎦᎸᏉᏔᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᏂᎦᏛ ᏚᏫᏢ ᎤᎾᏠᏯᏍᏗᎭ ᎠᎾᎵᎮᎵᎦ.
071226.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-no sa-quo u-wi-tlv ya-gi-li-yo-ga, ni-ga-dv du-wi-tlv u-na-tlo-ya-s-di-ha a-ni-gi-li-yo-ga; a-le i-yu sa-quo u-wi-tlv ga-lv-quo-ta-nv-hi yi-gi, ni-ga-dv du-wi-tlv u-na-tlo-ya-s-di-ha a-na-li-he-li-ga.

071227.english: Now ye are the body of Christ, and members in particular.
071227.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᏰᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏫᏞᏫᏒᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᎨᏒᎢ.
071227.phonetic: Ni-hi-no na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv a-ye-lv-i, a-le du-wi-tle-wi-sv-i na-s-gi i-tsi-si-yv-wi-ha ge-sv-i.

071228.english: And God hath set some in the church, first apostles, secondarily prophets, thirdly teachers, after that miracles, then gifts of healings, helps, governments, diversities of tongues.
071228.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏕᎤᏪᎧᏅ ᎠᏂᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᎾᎿᎭᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬᎢ; ᎢᎬᏱ ᎨᏒ, ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ; ᏔᎵᏁᏃ ᎨᏒ, ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ; ᏦᎢᏁᏃ ᎨᏒ, ᏗᎾᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ; ᎣᏂᏃ, ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ; ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎨᎦᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᏧᎾᏓᏅᏬᏗᏱ, ᎠᎾᎵᏍᏕᎵᏍᎩ, ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ, ᎢᎸᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᎩ ᏗᏂᏬᏂᏍᎩ.
071228.phonetic: A-le U-ne-la-nv-hi de-u-we-ka-nv a-ni-si-yv-wi-ha na-hna tsu-na-ne-lo-di u-na-da-tlu-gv-i; i-gv-yi ge-sv, ge-tsi-nv-si-dv; ta-li-ne-no ge-sv, a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi; tso-i-ne-no ge-sv, di-na-de-yo-hv-s-gi; o-ni-no, u-s-qua-ni-go-di tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi; hna-quo-no ge-ga-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-lv-hi tsu-na-da-nv-wo-di-yi, a-na-li-s-de-li-s-gi, nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi, i-lv-s-gi i-yu-da-le-gi di-ni-wo-ni-s-gi.

071229.english: Are all apostles? are all prophets? are all teachers? are all workers of miracles?
071229.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏛᏍᎪ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ?  ᏂᎦᏛᏍᎪ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ?  ᏂᎦᏛᏍᎪ ᏗᎾᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ?  ᏂᎦᏛᏍᎪ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ?
071229.phonetic: Ni-ga-dv-s-go ge-tsi-nv-si-dv?  ni-ga-dv-s-go a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi?  ni-ga-dv-s-go di-na-de-yo-hv-s-gi?  ni-ga-dv-s-go u-s-qua-ni-go-di tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi?

071230.english: Have all the gifts of healing? do all speak with tongues? do all interpret?
071230.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏛᏍᎪ ᏧᎾᏓᏅᏬᏗᏱ ᎨᎦᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎸᎯ?  ᏂᎦᏛᏍᎪ ᎢᎸᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᎩ ᏓᏂᏬᏂᎭ?  ᏂᎦᏛᏍᎪ ᎠᎾᏁᏢᏗᎭ?
071230.phonetic: ni-ga-dv-s-go tsu-na-da-nv-wo-di-yi ge-ga-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-lv-hi?  ni-ga-dv-s-go i-lv-s-gi i-yu-da-le-gi da-ni-wo-ni-ha?  ni-ga-dv-s-go a-na-ne-tlv-di-ha?

071231.english: But covet earnestly the best gifts: and yet shew I unto you a more excellent way.
071231.cherokee: ᎤᏣᏘ ᎠᏗᎾ ᎢᏣᏚᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎣᏌᏂ ᎤᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏅᏛᏨᏴᏁᎵ ᎤᏟ ᎢᏲᏍᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᏗᏱ.
071231.phonetic: U-tsa-ti a-di-na i-tsa-du-li-s-ge-s-di o-sa-ni u-da-ne-di ge-sv-i; a-se-no gv-ni-ge-sv nv-dv-tsv-yv-ne-li u-tli i-yo-s-dv i-ya-dv-ne-di-yi.

071301.english: Though I speak with the tongues of men and of angels, and have not charity, I am become as sounding brass, or a tinkling cymbal.
071301.cherokee: ᎾᏍᏉ ᏴᏫ ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎠᏁᎯ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᏧᏂᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᏱᏥᏬᏂᎭ, ᎾᎩᎲᎾᏃ ᏱᎩ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎥᏣᏱᏉ ᎤᏃᏴᎵᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏃᏴᎩ ᎤᎭᎸᏂᎯ ᏕᎦᏤᎳᎦ.
071301.phonetic: Na-s-quo yv-wi a-le ga-lv-la-di a-ne-hi di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi tsu-ni-wo-ni-hi-s-di yi-tsi-wo-ni-ha, na-gi-hv-na-no yi-gi a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv-i, v-tsa-yi-quo u-no-yv-li-dv a-le u-no-yv-gi u-ha-lv-ni-hi de-ga-tse-la-ga.

071302.english: And though I have the gift of prophecy, and understand all mysteries, and all knowledge; and though I have all faith, so that I could remove mountains, and have not charity, I am nothing.
071302.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏯᎩᎭ ᎠᏆᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏱᎪᎵᎦ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᎠᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏯᎩᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏰᎵᏉ ᏗᎬᎩᎲᏍᏗ ᏱᎩ ᏙᏓᎸᎢ; ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗᏃ ᎨᏒ ᎾᎩᎲᎾ ᏱᎩ, ᎪᎱᏍᏗᏉ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎠᏴ.
071302.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi ya-gi-ha a-qua-do-le-ho-hi-s-di-yi, a-le yi-go-li-ga ni-ga-di-yu u-de-li-dv ge-sv-i, a-le ni-ga-di-yu a-ga-do-v-hi-s-di ge-sv-i; a-le ni-ga-v go-hi-yu-di ge-sv ya-gi-ha, na-s-gi ye-li-quo di-gv-gi-hv-s-di yi-gi do-da-lv-i; a-da-ge-yu-di-no ge-sv na-gi-hv-na yi-gi, go-hu-s-di-quo ni-ge-sv-na a-yv.

071303.english: And though I bestow all my goods to feed the poor, and though I give my body to be burned, and have not charity, it profiteth me nothing.
071303.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎠᎩᎾᎥ ᏱᎦᏓᏃᏁᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏥᏰᎸ ᏱᏓᎩᏲᏒ ᎤᎾᎪᎲᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎾᎩᎲᎾᏃ ᏱᎩ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᎩᏁᏉᏤᎯ ᏱᎩ.
071303.phonetic: A-le na-s-quo ni-ga-v a-gi-na-v yi-ga-da-no-ne-ha, a-le na-s-quo tsi-ye-lv yi-da-gi-yo-sv u-na-go-hv-s-do-di-yi, na-gi-hv-na-no yi-gi a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv-i, v-tla go-hu-s-di a-gi-ne-quo-tse-hi yi-gi.

071304.english: Charity suffereth long, and is kind; charity envieth not; charity vaunteth not itself, is not puffed up,
071304.cherokee: ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏂᏗᏳ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏅᏘᏳ; ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎥᏝ ᏱᎬᏳᎪᎢ; ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎥᏝ ᏯᏢᏆᏍᎪᎢ; ᎥᏝ ᎤᏟ ᏳᏕᏋᎯᏍᏙᎢ;
071304.phonetic: A-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv gv-ni-di-yu, a-le u-da-nv-ti-yu; a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv v-tla yi-gv-yu-go-i; a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv v-tla ya-tlv-qua-s-go-i; v-tla u-tli yu-de-quv-hi-s-do-i;

071305.english: Doth not behave itself unseemly, seeketh not her own, is not easily provoked, thinketh no evil;
071305.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎤᏕᎰᎯᏍᏗ ᏱᎾᏛᏁᎰᎢ; ᎥᏝ ᎤᏩᏒᏉ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏳᏲᎰᎢ; ᎥᏝ ᏳᏔᎳᏬᎯᏌᏙᎢ; ᎥᏝ ᎤᏲ ᏯᏓᎳᏫᏎᎰᎢ;
071305.phonetic: V-tla u-de-ho-hi-s-di yi-na-dv-ne-ho-i; v-tla u-wa-sv-quo u-tse-li yu-yo-ho-i; v-tla yu-ta-la-wo-hi-sa-do-i; v-tla u-yo ya-da-la-wi-se-ho-i;

071306.english: Rejoiceth not in iniquity, but rejoiceth in the truth;
071306.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᏯᎵᎮᎵᎪ ᎤᏲ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏚᏳᎪᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᎵᎮᎵᎪᎢ;
071306.phonetic: V-tla ya-li-he-li-go u-yo di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv-i, du-yu-go-dv-s-gi-ni ge-sv na-hna a-li-he-li-go-i;

071307.english: Beareth all things, believeth all things, hopeth all things, endureth all things.
071307.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᎩᏉ ᎡᎵᏍᎪ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ; ᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎪ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ; ᏂᎦᎥᏉ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎤᏩᏐᎢ; ᎬᏂᏗᏳ ᎨᏐ ᏂᎦᎥᎢ.
071307.phonetic: U-ne-la-gi-quo e-li-s-go ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di; go-hi-yu-hv-s-go ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di; ni-ga-v-quo go-hu-s-di u-du-gi u-wa-so-i; gv-ni-di-yu ge-so ni-ga-v-i.

071308.english: Charity never faileth: but whether there be prophecies, they shall fail; whether there be tongues, they shall cease; whether there be knowledge, it shall vanish away.
071308.cherokee: ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎵᏛᏗᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ; ᎠᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᏛᎵᏛᏔᏂᏉ; ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏗᎦᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏙᏓᎦᎶᏐᏂ; ᎠᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎨᏒ ᏛᎵᏛᏔᏂ.
071308.phonetic: A-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv a-li-dv-di-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na; a-do-le-ho-hi-s-di-s-gi-ni ge-sv dv-li-dv-ta-ni-quo; tsu-da-le-nv-dv di-ga-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv do-da-ga-lo-so-ni; a-ga-do-v-hi-s-di na-s-quo ge-sv dv-li-dv-ta-ni.

071309.english: For we know in part, and we prophesy in part.
071309.cherokee: ᎢᎦᏛᏉᏰᏃ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏗᎦᏔᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᎦᏛᏉ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏓᏙᎴᎰᏍᎦ;
071309.phonetic: I-ga-dv-quo-ye-no ge-sv i-di-ga-ta-ha, a-le i-ga-dv-quo ge-sv i-da-do-le-ho-s-ga;

071310.english: But when that which is perfect is come, then that which is in part shall be done away.
071310.cherokee: ᎠᎧᎵᎢᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎵᏰᎢᎶᎸᎭ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎦᏛᏉ ᎨᏒ ᏛᎵᏛᏔᏂ.
071310.phonetic: A-ka-li-i-s-gi-ni ge-sv a-li-ye-i-lo-lv-ha, hna-quo na-s-gi i-ga-dv-quo ge-sv dv-li-dv-ta-ni.

071311.english: When I was a child, I spake as a child, I understood as a child, I thought as a child: but when I became a man, I put away childish things.
071311.cherokee: ᏥᏲᎵ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ ᎠᏲᎵ ᎤᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᏥᏬᏂᏍᎬᎩ, ᎠᏲᎵ ᎤᏬᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎪᎵᎬᎩ, ᎠᏲᎵ ᎤᏓᏅᏖᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎦᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬᎩ; ᎠᏆᏛᏅᏍᎩᏂ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎾᏆᎵᏍᏔᏅ, ᎠᏲᎵ ᏧᏤᎵ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏂᏓᏋᏁᎸᎩ.
071311.phonetic: Tsi-yo-li tsi-ge-sv-gi a-yo-li u-wo-ni-hi-s-di tsi-wo-ni-s-gv-gi, a-yo-li u-wo-li-s-di ge-sv go-li-gv-gi, a-yo-li u-da-nv-te-di ge-sv ga-da-nv-te-s-gv-gi; a-qua-dv-nv-s-gi-ni hna-quo na-qua-li-s-ta-nv, a-yo-li tsu-tse-li ge-sv i-yv-dv ni-da-quv-ne-lv-gi.

071312.english: For now we see through a glass, darkly; but then face to face: now I know in part; but then shall I know even as also I am known.
071312.cherokee: ᎪᎯᏰᏃ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏍᎪᎸ ᎢᏗᎪᏩᏗᎭ ᎠᏓᎨᏗᏱ; ᎾᎯᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏕᎦᎧᏛ ᏙᏓᏓᏓᎪᎯ; ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎦᏛᏉ ᏥᎦᏔᎭ; ᎾᎯᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏥᎦᏔᎮᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎥᎩᎦᏔᎲᎢ.
071312.phonetic: Go-hi-ye-no ge-sv u-s-go-lv i-di-go-wa-di-ha a-da-ge-di-yi; na-hi-yu-s-gi-ni ge-se-s-di de-ga-ka-dv do-da-da-da-go-hi; go-hi ge-sv i-ga-dv-quo tsi-ga-ta-ha; na-hi-yu-s-gi-ni ge-se-s-di tsi-ga-ta-he-s-di na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo v-gi-ga-ta-hv-i.

071313.english: And now abideth faith, hope, charity, these three; but the greatest of these is charity.
071313.cherokee: ᎪᎯᏃ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏁᎭ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎬᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏦᎢ; ᏭᏓᎪᎾᏛᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᎬᏒ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
071313.phonetic: Go-hi-no ge-sv a-ne-ha go-hi-yu-di ge-sv-i, a-le u-du-gi gv-di ge-sv-i, a-le a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv-i, hi-a na-s-gi tso-i; wu-da-go-na-dv-dv-s-gi-ni ga-lv-quo-di gv-sv a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv-i.

071401.english: Follow after charity, and desire spiritual gifts, but rather that ye may prophesy.
071401.cherokee: ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏥᏍᏓᏩᏕᎨᏍᏗ; ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᏚᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᎵᏍᎪᎸᏙᏗ; ᎠᏗᎾ Ꮀ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏣᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
071401.phonetic: A-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv i-tsi-s-da-wa-de-ge-s-di; a-le i-tsa-du-li-s-ge-s-di a-da-nv-do u-li-s-go-lv-do-di; a-di-na ho u-gv-wi-yu-se-s-di na-s-gi ge-tsa-do-le-ho-hi-s-di ge-sv-i.

071402.english: For he that speaketh in an unknown tongue speaketh not unto men, but unto God: for no man understandeth him; howbeit in the spirit he speaketh mysteries.
071402.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏰᏃ ᏱᎦᏬᏂᎭ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᎤᏂᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᏴᏫ ᏱᏗᎦᏬᏁᏗᏍᎪᎢ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎩᎶ ᏳᏬᎵᏤᎰᎢ; ᎠᏓᏅᏙᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎬᏗ ᎦᏬᏂᏍᎬ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᎦᎾᎸᎪᏫᏍᎪᎢ.
071402.phonetic: Gi-lo-ye-no yi-ga-wo-ni-ha nv-wa-na-da-le u-ni-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, v-tla yv-wi yi-di-ga-wo-ne-di-s-go-i, U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni; v-tla-ye-no gi-lo yu-wo-li-tse-ho-i; a-da-nv-do-s-gi-ni-no-nv gv-di ga-wo-ni-s-gv u-de-li-dv ga-na-lv-go-wi-s-go-i.

071403.english: But he that prophesieth speaketh unto men to edification, and exhortation, and comfort.
071403.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏍᎩᏂ ᏯᏙᎴᎰᏍᎦ ᏴᏫ ᏕᎦᏬᏁᏗᏍᎪ ᏓᎵᏂᎪᎯᏍᏗᏍᎪᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᎦᏂᎳᏕᎰᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᎦᎵᏍᏓᏗᏍᎪᎢ.
071403.phonetic: Gi-lo-s-gi-ni ya-do-le-ho-s-ga yv-wi de-ga-wo-ne-di-s-go da-li-ni-go-hi-s-di-s-go-i, a-le de-ga-ni-la-de-ho-i, a-le da-ga-li-s-da-di-s-go-i.

071404.english: He that speaketh in an unknown tongue edifieth himself; but he that prophesieth edifieth the church.
071404.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᏱᎦᏬᏂᎭ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᎤᏂᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ, ᎤᏩᏒ ᎠᏓᎵᏂᎪᎯᏍᏗᏍᎪᎢ; ᎩᎶᏍᎩᏂ ᏯᏙᎴᎰᏍᎦ ᏓᎵᏂᎪᎯᏍᏗᏍᎪ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬᎢ.
071404.phonetic: Gi-lo yi-ga-wo-ni-ha nv-wa-na-da-le u-ni-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv, u-wa-sv a-da-li-ni-go-hi-s-di-s-go-i; gi-lo-s-gi-ni ya-do-le-ho-s-ga da-li-ni-go-hi-s-di-s-go tsu-na-ne-lo-di u-na-da-tlu-gv-i.

071405.english: I would that ye all spake with tongues, but rather that ye prophesied: for greater is he that prophesieth than he that speaketh with tongues, except he interpret, that the church may receive edifying.
071405.cherokee: ᎣᏏᏳ ᏱᏥᏰᎸᎾ ᎢᏳᏃ ᏂᏥᎥ ᎢᎸᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᎩ ᏱᏗᏥᏬᏂᎭ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎰᎤᎬᏫᏳᎭ ᏱᏣᏙᎴᎰᏍᎦ; ᎤᏟᏰᏃ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ, ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎢᎸᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᎩ ᏗᎦᏬᏂᏍᎩ, ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᏯᏁᏢᏗᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬ ᏧᎾᎵᏂ ᎪᎯᏍᏗᏱ.
071405.phonetic: O-si-yu yi-tsi-ye-lv-na i-yu-no ni-tsi-v i-lv-s-gi i-yu-da-le-gi yi-di-tsi-wo-ni-ha; a-se-no ho-u-gv-wi-yu-ha yi-tsa-do-le-ho-s-ga; u-tli-ye-no a-tsi-lv-quo-di-yu na-s-gi na a-do-le-ho-s-gi, e-s-ga-quo na-s-gi na i-lv-s-gi i-yu-da-le-gi di-ga-wo-ni-s-gi, i-yu-s-gi-ni-no-nv ya-ne-tlv-di-ha, na-s-gi tsu-na-ne-lo-di u-na-da-tlu-gv tsu-na-li-ni go-hi-s-di-yi.

071406.english: Now, brethren, if I come unto you speaking with tongues, what shall I profit you, except I shall speak to you either by revelation, or by knowledge, or by prophesying, or by doctrine?
071406.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᏱᏫᏨᎷᏤᎸ ᎢᎸᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᎩ ᏱᏗᏥᏬᏂᎭ, ᎦᏙ ᎤᏍᏗ ᏱᏨᏁᏉᏏ, ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎢᏨᏬᏁᏗᏍᎬ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏱᏨᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏱᏂᏨᏴᏁᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᏱᎦᏙᎴᎰᏍᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᏱᏗᎦᏕᏲᎲᏍᎦ.
071406.phonetic: I-yu-no, i-da-li-nv-tli, yi-wi-tsv-lu-tse-lv i-lv-s-gi i-yu-da-le-gi yi-di-tsi-wo-ni-ha, ga-do u-s-di yi-tsv-ne-quo-si, i-yu-s-gi-ni-no-nv i-tsv-wo-ne-di-s-gv go-hu-s-di yi-tsv-na-nu-go-wi-se-ha, a-le i-tsi-ga-do-v-hi-s-di-yi yi-ni-tsv-yv-ne-ha, a-le yi-ga-do-le-ho-s-ga, a-le yi-di-ga-de-yo-hv-s-ga.

071407.english: And even things without life giving sound, whether pipe or harp, except they give a distinction in the sounds, how shall it be known what is piped or harped?
071407.cherokee: ᎾᏍᏉᏰᏃ ᎪᎱᏍᏗᏉ ᎬᏃᏛ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᏳᏃᏴᎦ, ᎠᏤᎷᎯᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎧᏃᎩᏍᏙᏗ ᏱᎩ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᏧᏓᎴᎿᎭᎢ ᏂᏚᏃᏴᎬᎾ ᏱᎩ, ᎦᏙ ᏱᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᏴᏙᎴᎰᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏤᎷᎯᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎧᏃᎩᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ?
071407.phonetic: Na-s-quo-ye-no go-hu-s-di-quo gv-no-dv ni-ge-sv-na, yu-no-yv-ga, a-tse-lu-hi-s-di a-le di-ka-no-gi-s-do-di yi-gi, i-yu-no tsu-da-le-hna-i ni-du-no-yv-gv-na yi-gi, ga-do yi-ga-li-s-do-da yv-do-le-ho-hi na-s-gi a-tse-lu-hi-dv ge-sv a-le na-s-gi di-ka-no-gi-dv ge-sv-i?

071408.english: For if the trumpet give an uncertain sound, who shall prepare himself to the battle?
071408.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎠᏤᎷᎯᏍᏗ ᎦᎪᎵᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏳᏃᏴᎦ, ᎦᎪ ᏯᏛᏅᎢᏍᏓ ᏓᎿᎭᏩ ᎤᏪᏅᏍᏗᏱ?
071408.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no a-tse-lu-hi-s-di ga-go-li-s-di ni-ge-sv-na yu-no-yv-ga, ga-go ya-dv-nv-i-s-da da-hna-wa u-we-nv-s-di-yi?

071409.english: So likewise ye, except ye utter by the tongue words easy to be understood, how shall it be known what is spoken? for ye shall speak into the air.
071409.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎯ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᏗᏥᏃᎪ ᏗᎬᏗ ᎦᎪᎵᏍᏗ ᏂᏥᏬᏂᏍᎬᎾ ᏱᎩ, ᎦᏙ ᏱᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᎬᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏗ ᏱᎩ, ᏂᏥᏪᏒ ᎢᏥᏬᏂᏒᎢ?  ᎦᏃᎴᏍᎬᏰᏃ ᎢᏥᏬᏁᏗᏍᎩ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
071409.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo ni-hi, i-yu-no di-tsi-no-go di-gv-di ga-go-li-s-di ni-tsi-wo-ni-s-gv-na yi-gi, ga-do yi-ga-li-s-do-da gv-do-le-ho-hi-s-di yi-gi, ni-tsi-we-sv i-tsi-wo-ni-sv-i?  ga-no-le-s-gv-ye-no i-tsi-wo-ne-di-s-gi ge-se-s-di.

071410.english: There are, it may be, so many kinds of voices in the world, and none of them is without signification.
071410.cherokee: ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᎩ ᏱᏓᏂᏬᏂᎭ ᎡᎶᎯ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏌᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᏛᎬᎾ ᏱᎩ.
071410.phonetic: Na-s-quo u-tsa-ti i-yu-da-le-gi yi-da-ni-wo-ni-ha e-lo-hi, a-se-no v-tla sa-quo na-s-gi go-hu-s-di ni-ga-dv-gv-na yi-gi.

071411.english: Therefore if I know not the meaning of the voice, I shall be unto him that speaketh a barbarian, and he that speaketh shall be a barbarian unto me.
071411.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏂᎪᎵᎬᎾ ᏱᎩ ᎦᏛᎬ ᎦᏬᏂᏍᎬᎢ, ᏅᏆᏓᎴᏉ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏱᎩ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏬᏂᏍᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏬᏂᏍᎩ ᏅᏩᏓᎴᏉ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏱᎩ ᎠᏴ ᏥᏯᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬᎢ.
071411.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no ni-go-li-gv-na yi-gi ga-dv-gv ga-wo-ni-s-gv-i, nv-qua-da-le-quo na-s-gi-ya yi-gi a-qua-da-nv-te-s-gv na-s-gi ga-wo-ni-s-gi; a-le na-s-gi ga-wo-ni-s-gi nv-wa-da-le-quo na-s-gi-ya yi-gi a-yv tsi-ya-da-nv-te-s-gv-i.

071412.english: Even so ye, forasmuch as ye are zealous of spiritual gifts, seek that ye may excel to the edifying of the church.
071412.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏥᏣᏚᎵ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎢᏥᏲᎮᏍᏗ ᏗᏣᏓᏓᎵᏁᎯᏕᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬ ᏗᏣᎵᏂᎪᎯᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
071412.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo ni-hi, na-s-gi u-tsa-ti tsi-tsa-du-li di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di a-da-nv-do u-da-ne-di ge-sv-i, i-tsi-yo-he-s-di di-tsa-da-da-li-ne-hi-de-di-yi na-s-gi tsu-na-ne-lo-di u-na-da-tlu-gv di-tsa-li-ni-go-hi-s-do-di-yi.

071413.english: Wherefore let him that speaketh in an unknown tongue pray that he may interpret.
071413.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎩᎶ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᎤᏂᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎦᏬᏂᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᏔᏲᎯᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ ᎤᏁᏢᏙᏗᏱ.
071413.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di gi-lo nv-wa-na-da-le u-ni-wo-ni-hi-s-di ga-wo-ni-s-ge-s-di, a-da-do-li-s-di-s-ge-s-di a-ta-yo-hi-he-s-di a-tsi-s-de-lv-di-yi u-ne-tlv-do-di-yi.

071414.english: For if I pray in an unknown tongue, my spirit prayeth, but my understanding is unfruitful.
071414.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᏱᎦᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᏱᎬᏗᎭ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᎤᏂᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏙ ᎠᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎪᎢ;  ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎥᏝ ᏱᎦᎾᏄᎪᏫᏍᎪ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ.
071414.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no yi-ga-da-do-li-s-di yi-gv-di-ha nv-wa-na-da-le u-ni-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, a-qua-da-nv-do a-da-do-li-s-di-s-go-i;  a-qua-da-nv-dv-s-gi-ni v-tla yi-ga-na-nu-go-wi-s-go o-s-dv ge-sv-i.

071415.english: What is it then? I will pray with the spirit, and I will pray with the understanding also: I will sing with the spirit, and I will sing with the understanding also.
071415.cherokee: ᎦᏙ ᎰᏩ ᎤᏍᏗ?  ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏙ ᎬᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎦᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎪᎵᏍᏗ ᎦᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᎠᎴ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏙ ᎬᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏕᏥᏃᎩᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎦᎪᎵᏍᏗ ᏕᏥᏃᎩᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
071415.phonetic: Ga-do ho-wa u-s-di?  a-qua-da-nv-do gv-di-s-ge-s-di ga-da-do-li-s-di-s-ge-s-di, a-le ga-go-li-s-di ga-da-do-li-s-di-s-ge-s-di; a-le a-qua-da-nv-do gv-di-s-ge-s-di de-tsi-no-gi-s-ge-s-di a-le ga-go-li-s-di de-tsi-no-gi-s-ge-s-di.

071416.english: Else when thou shalt bless with the spirit, how shall he that occupieth the room of the unlearned say Amen at thy giving of thanks, seeing he understandeth not what thou sayest?
071416.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏱᎩ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᎭᎵᎮᎵᏨ ᏣᏓᏅᏙ ᎲᏔᏅᎭ, ᎦᏙ ᏱᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎾᎦᏔᎾᎥᎾ ᎤᏪᏗᏱ ᏳᏬᎳ, ᏰᎵ ᎡᎺᏅ ᏯᏛ ᎭᎵᎮᎵᎩ?  ᏂᎪᎵᎬᎾᏰᏃ ᏱᎩ ᏂᏪᏍᎬᎢ.
071416.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no nu-s-dv yi-gi, hna-quo ha-li-he-li-tsv tsa-da-nv-do hv-ta-nv-ha, ga-do yi-ga-li-s-do-da na-s-gi na na-ga-ta-na-v-na u-we-di-yi yu-wo-la, ye-li E-me-nv ya-dv ha-li-he-li-gi?  ni-go-li-gv-na-ye-no yi-gi ni-we-s-gv-i.

071417.english: For thou verily givest thanks well, but the other is not edified.
071417.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏰᏃ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎣᏏᏳ ᏂᏪᎭ ᎭᎵᎮᎵᎬᎢ, ᏐᎢᏍᎩᏂ ᎥᏝ ᏳᎵᏂᎪᎯᏍᏗᎭ.
071417.phonetic: Ni-hi-ye-no u-do-hi-yu-hi o-si-yu ni-we-ha ha-li-he-li-gv-i, so-i-s-gi-ni v-tla yu-li-ni-go-hi-s-di-ha.

071418.english: I thank my God, I speak with tongues more than ye all:
071418.cherokee: ᏥᏯᎵᎡᎵᏤᎭ ᎠᏆᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᏗᎬᎩᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏗᎦᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᏂᎯ ᏂᏥᎥᎢ;
071418.phonetic: Tsi-ya-li-e-li-tse-ha A-qua-ne-la-nv-hi, na-s-gi u-tli i-ga-i di-gv-gi-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv tsu-da-le-nv-dv di-ga-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv e-s-ga-quo ni-hi ni-tsi-v-i;

071419.english: Yet in the church I had rather speak five words with my understanding, that by my voice I might teach others also, than ten thousand words in an unknown tongue.
071419.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬ ᎤᏟ ᎬᎩᏰᎸᏗ ᎾᎿᎭᎯᏍᎩᏉ ᎢᎧᏁᏨᎯ ᎠᎩᏁᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏛ ᎠᏋᏙᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎦᏥᏰᏲᏗᏱ, ᎠᏃ ᎠᏍᎪᎯ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᎢᎧᏁᏨᎯ ᎠᎩᏁᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᎤᏂᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏋᏙᏗᏱ.
071419.phonetic: A-se-no tsu-na-ne-lo-di u-na-da-tlu-gv u-tli gv-gi-ye-lv-di na-hna hi-s-gi-quo i-ka-ne-tsv-hi a-gi-ne-i-s-di-yi a-qua-da-nv-dv a-quv-do-di-yi, na-s-gi nv-wa-na-da-le na-s-quo ga-tsi-ye-yo-di-yi, a-no a-s-go-hi i-ya-ga-yv-li i-ka-ne-tsv-hi a-gi-ne-i-s-di-yi nv-wa-na-da-le u-ni-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv a-quv-do-di-yi.

071420.english: Brethren, be not children in understanding: howbeit in malice be ye children, but in understanding be men.
071420.cherokee: ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏗᏥᏲᎵ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ; ᎠᏓᏍᎦᎢᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎨᏒ ᏗᏥᏲᎵ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᏗᏣᏛᎾᏯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
071420.phonetic: I-da-li-nv-tli, tle-s-di di-tsi-yo-li yi-ge-se-s-di de-tsa-da-nv-dv-i; a-da-s-ga-i-s-di-s-gi-ni-no-nv ge-sv di-tsi-yo-li ge-se-s-di, de-tsa-da-nv-dv-s-gi-ni di-tsa-dv-na-ya ge-se-s-di.

071421.english: In the law it is written, With men of other tongues and other lips will I speak unto this people; and yet for all that will they not hear me, saith the Lord.
071421.cherokee: ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎪᏪᎳ, ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᏗᏂᏬᏂᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᏧᏂᎭᏁᎦᎵ ᏓᎦᏥᏴᏔᏂ ᎦᏓᏥᏬᏁᏔᏂ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏴᏫ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏏ ᎥᏝ ᏱᎬᏆᏛᎦᏁᎮᏍᏗ, ᎠᏗᎭ ᏱᎰᏩ.
071421.phonetic: Di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-yi hi-a ni-gv-nv go-we-la, Nv-wa-da-le di-ni-wo-ni-s-gi a-le nv-wa-da-le tsu-ni-ha-ne-ga-li da-ga-tsi-yv-ta-ni ga-da-tsi-wo-ne-ta-ni hi-a na-s-gi yv-wi; a-se-no a-si v-tla yi-gv-qua-dv-ga-ne-he-s-di, a-di-ha Yi-ho-wa.

071422.english: Wherefore tongues are for a sign, not to them that believe, but to them that believe not: but prophesying serveth not for them that believe not, but for them which believe.
071422.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏗᎦᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎪᎯᏳᏗᏍᎩ ᎠᏰᎸᎭ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᎤᏃᎯᏳᏓᏁᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ; ᎠᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ [ᎤᏃᎯᏳᏓᏁᎯ] ᏱᎩ, ᎠᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ.
071422.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no tsu-da-le-nv-dv di-ga-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv go-hi-yu-di-s-gi a-ye-lv-ha, v-tla a-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gi u-no-hi-yu-da-ne-hi yi-gi, a-s-gi-ni a-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na; a-do-le-ho-hi-s-di-s-gi-ni ge-sv v-tla a-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na [u-no-hi-yu-da-ne-hi] yi-gi, a-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gi-s-gi-ni.

071423.english: If therefore the whole church be come together into one place, and all speak with tongues, and there come in those that are unlearned, or unbelievers, will they not say that ye are mad?
071423.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏥᏄᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᏃ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎢᎸᎯᏢ ᏱᏚᏂᎳᏫᏦᏅ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏗᎦᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏱᏓᏂᏬᏂᎭ, ᏳᏂᏴᎵᎸᏃ ᎾᎿᎭᏂ ᎾᏂᎦᏔᎾᎥᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᏝᏍᎪ ᏚᏂᎸᏃᏘᎭ ᏴᎬᎾᏛ?
071423.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no tsi-nu-s-di i-yu-no tsu-na-ne-lo-di u-na-da-tlu-gv ni-ga-dv i-lv-hi-tlv yi-du-ni-la-wi-tso-nv, a-le ni-ga-dv tsu-da-le-nv-dv di-ga-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv yi-da-ni-wo-ni-ha, yu-ni-yv-li-lv-no na-hna-ni na-ni-ga-ta-na-v-na, a-le a-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gi-ni ni-ge-sv-na, tla-s-go du-ni-lv-no-ti-ha yv-gv-na-dv?

071424.english: But if all prophesy, and there come in one that believeth not, or one unlearned, he is convinced of all, he is judged of all:
071424.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏯᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎦ, ᏳᏴᎵᎸᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎾᎦᏔᎾᎥᎾ, ᎾᏂᎥ ᎬᏬᎯᏳᏓᏁᎰᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏕᎬᏭᎪᏓᏁᎰᎢ;
071424.phonetic: I-yu-s-gi-ni ni-ga-dv ya-na-do-le-ho-s-ga, yu-yv-li-lv-no gi-lo go-hi-yu-hv-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na, a-le gi-lo na-ga-ta-na-v-na, na-ni-v gv-wo-hi-yu-da-ne-ho-i, a-le na-ni-v de-gv-wu-go-da-ne-ho-i;

071425.english: And thus are the secrets of his heart made manifest; and so falling down on his face he will worship God, and report that God is in you of a truth.
071425.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏛ ᎤᎾᏫᏱ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏱᏂᎦᎵᏍᏓ; ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏯᎵᏰᏍᏚᎲᎦ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏯᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏏ, ᎠᎴ ᏱᏕᎦᏃᏣᎸᎦ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎢᏣᏓᏑᏴᎢ.
071425.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no u-de-li-dv u-s-qua-ni-go-dv u-na-wi-yi gv-ni-ge-sv yi-ni-ga-li-s-da; na-s-gi-no ya-li-ye-s-du-hv-ga U-ne-la-nv-hi ya-da-do-li-s-da-si, a-le yi-de-ga-no-tsa-lv-ga U-ne-la-nv-hi u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya i-tsa-da-su-yv-i.

071426.english: How is it then, brethren? when ye come together, everyone of you hath a psalm, hath a doctrine, hath a tongue, hath a revelation, hath an interpretation. Let all things be done unto edifying.
071426.cherokee: ᎦᏙ ᎰᏩ ᎤᏍᏗ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ?  ᎢᏳᏃ ᏕᏥᎳᏫᎩ, ᎢᏥᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᏗᎧᏃᎩᏛ ᎢᏣᏛᏅᎢᏍᏙᎢ, ᏗᏕᏲᏗ ᎢᏣᏛᏅᎢᏍᏙᎢ, ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏗᎦᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᏛᏅᎢᏍᏙᎢ, ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᎬᏁᏗ ᎢᏣᏛᏅᎢᏍᏙᎢ, ᎠᏁᏢᏙᏗ ᎢᏣᏛᏅᎢᏍᏙᎢ.  ᏂᎦᏛ ᎠᏗᎾ ᏕᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᏗᏣᏓᎵᏂᎪᎯᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᎬᏩᎴᏍᏗ.
071426.phonetic: Ga-do ho-wa u-s-di, i-da-li-nv-tli?  i-yu-no de-tsi-la-wi-gi, i-tsi-si-yv-wi-ha di-ka-no-gi-dv i-tsa-dv-nv-i-s-do-i, di-de-yo-di i-tsa-dv-nv-i-s-do-i, tsu-da-le-nv-dv di-ga-wo-ni-hi-s-di i-tsa-dv-nv-i-s-do-i, gv-ni-ge-sv i-gv-ne-di i-tsa-dv-nv-i-s-do-i, a-ne-tlv-do-di i-tsa-dv-nv-i-s-do-i.  Ni-ga-dv a-di-na de-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv di-tsa-da-li-ni-go-hi-s-do-di-yi u-gv-wa-le-s-di.

071427.english: If any man speak in an unknown tongue, let it be by two, or at the most by three, and that by course; and let one interpret.
071427.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᏧᏂᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏱᎦᏬᏂᎭ, ᎠᏂᏔᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᏦᎢ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏩᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᏓᏂᏬᏂᏎᎨᏍᏗ ᏌᏉ ᎤᏪᏒᏛ; ᎠᏏᏴᏫᏃ ᎠᏁᏢᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
071427.phonetic: I-yu-no gi-lo nv-wa-na-da-le tsu-ni-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv yi-ga-wo-ni-ha, a-ni-ta-li, a-le tso-i i-yv-dv wa-s-de-s-di da-ni-wo-ni-se-ge-s-di sa-quo u-we-sv-dv; a-si-yv-wi-no a-ne-tlv-di-s-ge-s-di.

071428.english: But if there be no interpreter, let him keep silence in the church; and let him speak to himself, and to God.
071428.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏁᏢᏗᏍᎩ ᏁᏙᎲᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎡᎳᏪᏉ ᎤᏩᏎᏍᏗ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬᎢ; ᎤᏩᏒᏉ ᎠᏓᎵᏃᎮᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎵᏃᎮᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
071428.phonetic: I-yu-s-gi-ni a-ne-tlv-di-s-gi ne-do-hv-na i-ge-se-s-di, e-la-we-quo u-wa-se-s-di tsu-na-ne-lo-di u-na-da-tlu-gv-i; u-wa-sv-quo a-da-li-no-he-di-s-ge-s-di, a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi a-li-no-he-di-s-ge-s-di.

071429.english: Let the prophets speak two or three, and let the other judge.

071430.english: If any thing be revealed to another that sitteth by, let the first hold his peace.
071430.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏯᏥᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎸ ᎩᎶ ᎾᎥ ᎤᏬᎵ, ᎢᎬᏱ ᎤᎴᏅᏛ ᎡᎳᏪ ᎬᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
071430.phonetic: I-yu-no go-hu-s-di ya-tsi-na-nu-go-wi-se-lv gi-lo na-v u-wo-li, i-gv-yi u-le-nv-dv e-la-we gv-s-ge-s-di.

071431.english: For ye may all prophesy one by one, that all may learn, and all may be comforted.
071431.cherokee: ᏂᏥᎥᏰᏃ ᏰᎵ ᎨᏥᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏗ ᏌᏉ ᎤᏪᏒᏛ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎤᎾᏕᎶᏆᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎤᏂᎦᎵᏍᏓᏗᏍᏗᏱ.
071431.phonetic: Ni-tsi-v-ye-no ye-li ge-tsi-do-le-ho-hi-s-di sa-quo u-we-sv-dv; na-s-gi na-ni-v u-na-de-lo-qua-s-di-yi, a-le na-ni-v u-ni-ga-li-s-da-di-s-di-yi.

071432.english: And the spirits of the prophets are subject to the prophets.
071432.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏧᎾᏤᎵ ᏗᏓᏅᏙ ᏓᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎪ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ.
071432.phonetic: A-le a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi tsu-na-tse-li di-da-nv-do da-no-hi-yu-hv-s-go a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi.

071433.english: For God is not the author of confusion, but of peace, as in all churches of the saints.
071433.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎬᏁᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏥᏄᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏚᎾᏓᏡᏩᏗᏒ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ.
071433.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no v-tla tsu-da-le-nv-dv ge-sv i-gv-ne-hi yi-gi, nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv-s-gi-ni ge-sv-i, na-s-gi-ya tsi-nu-s-di ni-ga-dv du-na-da-tlu-wa-di-sv u-na-da-nv-ti.

071434.english: Let your women keep silence in the churches: for it is not permitted unto them to speak; but they are commanded to be under obedience, as also saith the law.
071434.cherokee: ᎠᏂᎨᏴ ᏗᏣᏤᎵ ᎡᎳᏪᏉ ᎤᏅᏎᏍᏗ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᏚᎾᏓᏡᏩᏗᏒᎢ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎨᎦᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᏱᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗᏱ; ᎤᏃᎯᏳᏗᏱᏉᏍᎩᏂ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏥᏂᎦᏪ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ.
071434.phonetic: A-ni-ge-yv di-tsa-tse-li e-la-we-quo u-nv-se-s-di tsu-na-ne-lo-di du-na-da-tlu-wa-di-sv-i; v-tla-ye-no ge-ga-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-lv-hi yi-gi na-s-gi u-ni-wo-ni-hi-s-di-yi; u-no-hi-yu-di-yi-quo-s-gi-ni, na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo tsi-ni-ga-we di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di.

071435.english: And if they will learn any thing, let them ask their husbands at home: for it is a shame for women to speak in the church.
071435.cherokee: ᎢᏳ ᎠᎴ ᏳᎾᏚᎵ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᎾᏕᎶᏆᏍᏗᏱ, ᏗᎬᏩᏂᏰᎯ ᏧᎾᏛᏛᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏙᏧᏁᏅᏒᎢ; ᎤᏕᎰᎯᏍᏗᏳᏰᏃ ᎠᏂᎨᏴ ᎤᏂᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬᎢ.
071435.phonetic: I-yu a-le yu-na-du-li go-hu-s-di u-na-de-lo-qua-s-di-yi, di-gv-wa-ni-ye-hi tsu-na-dv-dv-hv-s-ge-s-di do-tsu-ne-nv-sv-i; u-de-ho-hi-s-di-yu-ye-no a-ni-ge-yv u-ni-wo-ni-hi-s-di-yi tsu-na-ne-lo-di u-na-da-tlu-gv-i.

071436.english: What? came the word of God out from you? or came it unto you only?
071436.cherokee: ᏥᎪ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏤᎲ ᏧᏓᎴᏁ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ?  ᏥᎪᎨ ᏂᎯᏉ ᎢᏨᏒ ᎢᏥᎷᏤᎴᎢ?
071436.phonetic: Tsi-go ni-hi i-tse-hv tsu-da-le-ne ka-no-he-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga?  tsi-go-ge ni-hi-quo i-tsv-sv i-tsi-lu-tse-le-i?

071437.english: If any man think himself to be a prophet, or spiritual, let him acknowledge that the things that I write unto you are the commandments of the Lord.
071437.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᎦᏙᎴᎣᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᏓᏁᏗ ᎠᎩᎯ ᎢᎡᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏂᎬᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏫᏨᏲᏪᎳᏁᎭ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏁᏨᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
071437.phonetic: I-yu-no gi-lo a-da-nv-te-s-gv ga-do-le-o-s-gi a-le a-da-nv-do u-da-ne-di a-gi-hi i-e-li-s-ge-s-di, na-s-gi gv-ni-ge-sv ni-gv-ne-he-s-di na-s-gi hi-a tsi-wi-tsv-yo-we-la-ne-ha u-gv-wi-yu-hi u-ne-tsv-hi ge-sv-i.

071438.english: But if any man be ignorant, let him be ignorant.
071438.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎩᎶ ᎾᎦᏔᎲᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎤᏁᎳᎩᏉ ᎾᎦᏔᎲᎾ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
071438.phonetic: I-yu-s-gi-ni gi-lo na-ga-ta-hv-na i-ge-se-s-di, u-ne-la-gi-quo na-ga-ta-hv-na ge-se-s-di.

071439.english: Wherefore, brethren, covet to prophesy, and forbid not to speak with tongues.
071439.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎢᏣᏚᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏥᏅᏍᏙᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎦᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏧᏂᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
071439.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-da-li-nv-tli, i-tsa-du-li-s-ge-s-di i-tsa-do-le-ho-hi-s-di-yi, a-le tle-s-di yi-tsi-nv-s-do-s-ge-s-di ga-wo-ni-hi-s-di-yi tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv tsu-ni-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv-i.

071440.english: Let all things be done decently and in order.
071440.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏛ ᏕᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᎤᏬᏚᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎣᏍᏛ Ꭰ'ᏱᎸᏛ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
071440.phonetic: Ni-ga-dv de-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv u-wo-du-hi a-le o-s-dv a-'-yi-lv-dv ge-se-s-di.

071501.english: Moreover, brethren, I declare unto you the gospel which I preached unto you, which also ye have received, and wherein ye stand;
071501.cherokee: ᎠᎴᏬ ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏂᏨᏴᏁᎭ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏨᏯᎵᏥᏙᏁᎸᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏥᏕᏣᏓᏂᎸᏨ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᏥᏕᏥᏂᏴᎭ;
071501.phonetic: A-le-wo i-da-li-nv-tli, gv-ni-ge-sv ni-tsv-yv-ne-ha o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv, na-s-gi tsi-tsv-ya-li-tsi-do-ne-lv-gi, a-le na-s-gi na-s-quo tsi-de-tsa-da-ni-lv-tsv, a-le na-s-gi u-li-ni-gi-dv tsi-de-tsi-ni-yv-ha;

071502.english: By which also ye are saved, if ye keep in memory what I preached unto you, unless ye have believed in vain.
071502.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏥᏣᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎠᏍᏓᏯ ᏱᏗᏥᏂᏴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏨᏯᎵᏥᏙᏁᎸᎩ, ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎠᏎᏉᏉ ᏱᎩ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏒᎢ.
071502.phonetic: Na-s-gi na-s-quo tsi-tsa-li-s-de-lv-do-di, i-yu-no a-s-da-ya yi-di-tsi-ni-yv na-s-gi tsi-tsv-ya-li-tsi-do-ne-lv-gi, i-yu-s-gi-ni-no-nv a-se-quo-quo yi-gi i-tso-hi-yu-sv-i.

071503.english: For I delivered unto you first of all that which I also received, how that Christ died for our sins according to the scriptures;
071503.cherokee: ᎢᎬᏱᏱᏰᏃ ᎨᏒ ᏕᏣᏲᎯᏎᎸᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏴ ᏨᎩᏲᎯᏎᎸᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᏴ ᎢᎩᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᎢᎩᏲᎱᎯᏎᎸᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎪᏪᎵᎯ;
071503.phonetic: I-gv-yi-yi-ye-no ge-sv de-tsa-yo-hi-se-lv-gi na-s-gi na-s-quo a-yv tsv-gi-yo-hi-se-lv-gi, na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv a-yv i-gi-s-ga-nv-tsv i-gi-yo-hu-hi-se-lv-i, na-s-gi-ya ni-gv-nv go-we-li-hi;

071504.english: And that he was buried, and that he rose again the third day according to the scriptures:
071504.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏥᏂᏌᏅᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏦᎢᏁ ᎢᎦ ᏙᎤᎴᎯᏌᏅ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎪᏪᎵᎯ;
071504.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi a-tsi-ni-sa-nv-i, a-le na-s-gi tso-i-ne i-ga do-u-le-hi-sa-nv na-s-gi-ya ni-gv-nv-go-we-li-hi;

071505.english: And that he was seen of Cephas, then of the twelve:
071505.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏏᏆᏏ ᎤᎪᎲᎢ, ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏔᎳᏚ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ.
071505.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi Si-qua-si u-go-hv-i, hna-quo-no ta-la-du i-ya-ni-dv.

071506.english: After that, he was seen of above five hundred brethren at once; of whom the greater part remain unto this present, but some are fallen asleep.
071506.cherokee: ᎣᏂᏃ ᎯᏍᎩᏧᏈ ᎤᎶᏒᏍᏗ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎬᏩᎪᎮᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏃ [ᎬᏩᎪᎲᎯ] ᎤᏟ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎠᎾᎴᏂᏙ ᎠᏏ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎢᎦᏛᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᏚᏂᎵᏅᏨ.
071506.phonetic: O-ni-no hi-s-gi-tsu-qui u-lo-sv-s-di i-ya-ni-dv a-na-li-nv-tli i-tsu-la-ha gv-wa-go-he-i; na-s-gi-no [gv-wa-go-hv-hi] u-tli i-ya-ni-dv a-na-le-ni-do a-si go-hi ge-sv-i, i-ga-dv-s-gi-ni-no-nv du-ni-li-nv-tsv.

071507.english: After that, he was seen of James; then of all the apostles.
071507.cherokee: ᎣᏂᏃ ᏥᎻ ᎤᎪᎮᎢ; ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ [ᎢᎬᏩᎪᎮᎢ.]
071507.phonetic: O-ni-no Tsi-mi u-go-he-i; hna-quo-no ni-ga-dv ge-tsi-nv-si-dv [i-gv-wa-go-he-i.]

071508.english: And last of all he was seen of me also, as of one born out of due time.
071508.cherokee: ᎣᏂᏱᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏴ ᎥᏥᎪᎥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏕᏗᏱ ᏄᏍᏆᎸᎲᎾᏉ ᏣᏕᎲᏍᎪ ᏣᏓᎪᏩᏘᏍᎪᎢ.
071508.phonetic: O-ni-yi-no na-s-quo a-yv v-tsi-go-v-gi, na-s-gi-ya gi-lo u-de-di-yi nu-s-qua-lv-hv-na-quo tsa-de-hv-s-go tsa-da-go-wa-ti-s-go-i.

071509.english: For I am the least of the apostles, that am not meet to be called an apostle, because I persecuted the church of God.
071509.cherokee: ᎠᏴᏰᏃ ᎠᏆᏍᏗᎧᏂ ᎣᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᏝ ᏰᎵ ᎠᏥᏅᏏᏛ ᎦᏴᏉᏎᏗ ᏱᎩ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎤᏲ ᏂᎦᏥᏴᏁᎸ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ.
071509.phonetic: A-yv-ye-no a-qua-s-di-ka-ni o-gi-nv-si-dv ge-sv-i, na-s-gi v-tla ye-li a-tsi-nv-si-dv ga-yv-quo-se-di yi-gi, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha u-yo ni-ga-tsi-yv-ne-lv tsu-na-ne-lo-di u-na-da-tlu-gv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga.
